en.commentary:
The portable Bluetooth speaker market in 2026 is better than it has ever been, and the JBL Charge 6 sits at the top of it for a simple reason: it does everything well and costs $199. At 45W with AI Sound Boost, IP68 waterproofing, a 28-hour battery, a built-in powerbank, and Auracast multi-speaker support, there is no comparable speaker at its price point. It is the correct answer for most people most of the time.

The Marshall Emberton III earns second place because it solves a different problem with equal conviction. At 680 grams and 32 hours of battery life, it is the speaker you actually take with you everywhere. The IP67 rating holds up. The sound is warm and full for the size. At $170, it is genuinely excellent value.

The Bose SoundLink Max is the loudest and most acoustically capable speaker on this list, reaching 97dB with dual 89mm transducers. It costs $399 and weighs 2.13kg. That is a deliberate trade-off, not a flaw. If outdoor volume and audio fidelity are your priorities, it is the right call.

Sonos Move 2 is the speaker for anyone already in the Sonos or Apple ecosystem. AirPlay 2, automatic Trueplay room calibration, and Wi-Fi playback make it feel like a proper home speaker that happens to be portable. The $360 price is steep compared to pure Bluetooth alternatives, but no other portable speaker bridges indoor and outdoor use this seamlessly.

The JBL Flip 7 at $150 and the Anker Soundcore Motion X600 at $199 represent the strongest value-per-dollar options on this list. The Flip 7 is genuinely the best compact portable speaker at its price. The Motion X600 brings Hi-Res certification and a 5-driver spatial audio array that competes well above its price tier.

The B&O Beosound A1 3rd Gen and UE Hyperboom serve specific audiences. The B&O is for people who want a speaker built to a standard rather than a price, with 60W, aptX Adaptive, and construction that will outlast several device cycles. The Hyperboom is the choice when sheer volume is the brief: 180W, 45-meter Bluetooth range, and enough bass to feel in your chest.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 is the correct answer for most buyers
highlights.body: At $199, the Charge 6 delivers 45W of output with AI Sound Boost, an IP68 rating that survives full submersion, a 28-hour battery, Auracast multi-speaker connectivity, and a built-in powerbank to charge your phone. No other speaker at this price matches the combination of audio performance, outdoor durability, and practical utility. It led sales charts throughout early 2026 for exactly this reason.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III has the best battery life on this list
highlights.body: Thirty-two hours of continuous playback is a number that makes every other speaker on this list look compromised. The Emberton III weighs 680 grams, which means it fits in a jacket pocket, survives IP67 immersion, and still sounds richer and more musical than most speakers at its $170 price. If you travel frequently and want a speaker that goes days between charges, this is the pick.

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max is the loudest and clearest outdoor speaker here
highlights.body: The SoundLink Max achieves 97dB at maximum volume through dual 89mm full-range transducers and a dedicated 23mm tweeter. That configuration produces a stereo image and bass extension that smaller speakers cannot replicate regardless of software tuning. Its IP67 rating and 20-hour battery make it properly outdoor-ready. The $399 price and 2.13kg weight are real constraints, but the acoustic result justifies them for anyone prioritizing performance over convenience.

highlights.title: Sonos Move 2 is the only portable speaker that works equally well indoors and outdoors
highlights.body: Every other speaker on this list is a Bluetooth device that can be used outside. The Move 2 is a full smart speaker with AirPlay 2 and Wi-Fi that can also be taken outdoors. Automatic Trueplay tuning adjusts the sound profile based on the acoustic environment, meaning it sounds calibrated whether it is on a shelf or a picnic table. For households with Apple devices and Sonos systems, this interoperability is worth the $360 premium.

highlights.title: JBL Flip 7 sets the standard for compact sub-$200 portable speakers
highlights.body: At $150, the Flip 7 packs 35W, IP68 waterproofing, AI Sound Boost, Auracast, and a PushLock carrying system into a 826-gram cylindrical form factor. It replaced the Flip 6 with meaningfully better bass, improved tweeter design, and Bluetooth 5.4. For buyers who want a speaker they can take to the beach, pool, or camping without worrying about it, the Flip 7 is the most sensible choice under $200.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年的攜帶式藍牙喇叭市場非常精彩，各個價位都有強力競爭者，但 JBL Charge 6 還是坐在第一名的位置，原因很直接：六千多元買到 45W 輸出、IP68 防水、28 小時續航、還能幫手機充電，再加上 Auracast 多喇叭串流，同價位找不到對手。

Marshall Emberton III 第二名實至名歸。680g 的重量，裝進口袋完全沒問題，IP67 防水抗摔，32 小時續航更是這份名單裡最長的，拿去露營放個週末都不用充電。音色偏暖偏飽，有 Marshall 的個性，NT$6,490 真的很值。

Bose SoundLink Max 的音質和音壓是這份名單裡最強的，97dB 最大音量配上雙 89mm 單體加高音單體，音場和低頻延伸都不是小喇叭能比的。2.13kg 不算輕巧，NT$12,900 也不便宜，但如果你的需求就是戶外派對要夠大聲夠好聽，它是對的選擇。

Sonos Move 2 適合家裡有 Apple 生態系的人。AirPlay 2、Wi-Fi 串流、自動 Trueplay 音場校正，室內可以當定點喇叭，帶出門繼續用藍牙，無縫切換這件事做得比任何競爭者都好。JBL Flip 7 在 NT$4,990 左右的甜蜜點把 IP68、AI Sound Boost、Auracast 全打包進來，是預算有限的最佳解。

Anker Soundcore Motion X600 五顆單體、Hi-Res 認證、空間音效，六千元有找，CP 值高到有點不合理。B&O Beosound A1 第三代和 UE Hyperboom 則是各有針對的買家，前者是追求工藝和音質的精品選擇，後者是戶外派對要嗨翻全場的音壓怪獸。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 是大多數人的最佳解
highlights.body: NT$6,980，買到 45W 輸出、AI Sound Boost 即時訊號處理、IP68 可沉入水中一米半、28 小時續航、內建行動電源還有 Auracast 多喇叭串流。這個規格組合在這個價位沒有敵手，2026 年初它持續領跑銷售榜單，絕對不是沒有原因的。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 的 32 小時續航在這份名單裡無人能及
highlights.body: 三十二小時，這個數字讓名單裡其他喇叭看起來都在妥協。Emberton III 只重 680g，塞進外套口袋沒問題，IP67 防水，音色帶著 Marshall 一貫的溫暖和厚度，NT$6,490 的售價對應這個規格，相當有說服力。去露營、出遠門、不想帶充電線，選它準沒錯。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max 是戶外音壓和音質的天花板
highlights.body: 最大 97dB，雙 89mm 全音域單體加 23mm 高音，這個配置帶來的音場寬度和低頻下潛，是用軟體調音的小喇叭複製不出來的。IP67 防水、20 小時續航，戶外使用完全不用擔心。2.13kg 的重量和 NT$12,900 的售價確實設了門檻，但如果你的需求是戶外音質要夠好、聲音要夠大，它是這份名單裡最正確的答案。

highlights.title: Sonos Move 2 是唯一能在室內外無縫切換的智慧喇叭
highlights.body: 名單裡其他喇叭本質上都是可以帶出門的藍牙裝置。Move 2 是一顆可以帶出門的智慧喇叭，支援 AirPlay 2 和 Wi-Fi，自動 Trueplay 音場校正會根據放置環境調整輸出，放書架上有書架上的聲音，搬到陽台繼續好聽。家裡有 Apple 裝置和 Sonos 系統的用戶，這個整合體驗值得那個價格差距。

highlights.title: JBL Flip 7 是五千元以下最沒有缺點的攜帶式喇叭
highlights.body: 35W、IP68、AI Sound Boost、Auracast，826g 塞進隨身包沒壓力。Flip 7 從 Flip 6 升級了低音單體設計、新增高音球頂、藍牙升到 5.4，NT$4,990 左右的售價對應這個規格，是預算不想太高但也不想將就音質的人最該考慮的選項。

en.commentary:
The portable Bluetooth speaker ranking remains stable this week with no major product launches or market events to trigger re-evaluation. The JBL Charge 6 holds its first-place position for the same reason it earned it: $199 buys you 45W output, IP68 waterproofing, a 28-hour battery, a built-in powerbank, and Auracast multi-speaker connectivity. That combination is unmatched at its price in April 2026.

The Marshall Emberton III holds second with its 32-hour battery and 680g weight, which remain the best portability-to-audio-quality ratio in the category. The Bose SoundLink Max at third continues to be the outdoor audio performance reference at 97dB, and the Sonos Move 2 at fourth is still the only portable speaker that functions as a full smart speaker with AirPlay 2 and Wi-Fi. The JBL Flip 7 at fifth holds its position as the best compact choice under $200. No meaningful changes to the rankings this week — the market has stabilized at the current competitive tier structure.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 remains the best all-around portable speaker at $199
highlights.body: 45W AI Sound Boost, IP68 immersion protection, 28-hour battery, powerbank output, and Auracast multi-speaker support in a 2.1kg package. The Charge 6 continues to lead the category at its price point with no meaningful challenger emerging in the past week. Retailers are reporting it as a consistent top seller in the portable speaker category through Q1 2026.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III holds the best battery-to-weight ratio on this list
highlights.body: Thirty-two hours of playback from a 680g speaker is a specification that no competitor at the $170 price tier has matched in 2026. The IP67 rating holds up to outdoor use, and the warm, full sound signature at this size remains distinctive against the more clinical tuning of JBL and Bose alternatives. For frequent travelers who want music for days without managing charging, this is the pick.

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max is the reference for outdoor acoustic performance
highlights.body: 97dB maximum output through dual 89mm transducers and a 23mm tweeter produces a stereo image and bass extension that compact cylindrical speakers — regardless of wattage claims — cannot replicate. IP67 protection and 20-hour battery make it outdoor-ready. At $399 and 2.13kg, it is a deliberate trade-off for listeners who treat outdoor audio quality as a priority rather than a convenience.

highlights.title: UE Hyperboom is the correct choice for outdoor event coverage
highlights.body: 180W and 45-meter Bluetooth range serve a specific use case: outdoor parties, beach gatherings, or any venue where filling a large space with music matters more than portability. The Hyperboom's adaptive EQ adjusts for outdoor acoustic environments, and the 24-hour battery handles a full day without charging. For buyers whose primary use is large-group outdoor entertainment, no other speaker on this list approaches its coverage capacity.

zh-tw.commentary:
本週攜帶式藍牙喇叭的排名沒有重大變動，市場上沒有新品發布或值得重新評估的事件。JBL Charge 6 繼續排第一，理由和昨天一樣：NT$6,980 買到 45W 輸出、IP68 防水、28 小時續航、行動電源功能、Auracast 多喇叭串流，這個組合在這個售價沒有對手。

Marshall Emberton III 靠 32 小時電池和 680g 重量守住第二，這個攜帶性對音質的比值還是這個類別最好的。Bose SoundLink Max 繼續是戶外音壓和音質的天花板，97dB 最大音量和雙單體配置是便攜小圓柱喇叭複製不了的。Sonos Move 2 還是這份名單裡唯一支援 AirPlay 2 和 Wi-Fi 的智慧喇叭，室內定點、帶去戶外繼續用藍牙，無縫切換這件事做得最好。JBL Flip 7 繼續是 NT$4,990 左右最好的攜帶式喇叭。本週沒有需要調整排名的市場變化。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 繼續是 NT$7,000 以下的最佳選擇
highlights.body: 45W AI Sound Boost、IP68 完全防水、28 小時續航、幫手機充電的行動電源功能、Auracast 多喇叭串流，這個規格組合在這個售價這週依然沒有對手。2026 年第一季的銷售數據顯示它是這個類別持續最暢銷的選項。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 的 32 小時電池和重量比這份名單裡無人能及
highlights.body: 680g 跑 32 小時，是 2026 年 NT$6,000 左右這個價位沒有競品能複製的規格組合。IP67 防水應付戶外使用沒問題，Marshall 溫暖飽滿的音色在這個尺寸下還是很有個性，對比 JBL 和 Bose 比較中性的調音有明顯的差異。出差、露營、不想頻繁充電的場景，這台是最合理的選擇。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max 是戶外音效表現的參考標準
highlights.body: 雙 89mm 單體加 23mm 高音的最大 97dB 音量，帶來的音場寬度和低頻下潛是圓柱小喇叭不管標注多少瓦數都複製不了的。IP67 防水、20 小時電池，完全適合戶外。NT$12,900 加上 2.13kg，這是一個有意識的取捨，適合把戶外音質當成優先考量的買家。

highlights.title: UE Hyperboom 是戶外大型活動的正確選擇
highlights.body: 180W 和 45 公尺藍牙範圍服務的是一個特定需求：戶外派對、海邊聚會、需要覆蓋大空間的場景。自動 EQ 校正針對戶外聲學環境調整輸出，24 小時電量撐過一整天。如果你的主要使用場景是大型戶外娛樂，這份名單裡沒有其他選項能接近它的覆蓋能力。

references.title: I test Bluetooth speakers for a living, and after pitting JBL and Marshall's middleweights against one another, this is the model that I'd recommend
Marshall is taking on JBL and other party speaker makers in a 'very homogenous' market

en.commentary: JBL Charge 6 holds rank 1 as the best Bluetooth speaker for most users in April 2026, and this assessment is grounded in the data: IP68 waterproofing, 24-hour battery, strong bass response, and competitive clarity make it the most versatile portable speaker I'd recommend across use cases from beach outings to camping to desktop use. Marshall Emberton III at rank 2 earns its spot for users who want the Marshall aesthetic with legitimate acoustic quality — the signature mid-heavy sound profile and golden script logo aren't just looks, the acoustic performance backs them up. Marshall launched the Bromley 450 and Bromley 750 in March 2026, entering the party speaker segment to compete directly with JBL. These new models target a different audience than the Emberton — larger, louder, and with visual lighting effects — but the Emberton III's acoustic-first positioning remains strong at its price point. Bose SoundLink Max at rank 3 delivers the most accurate frequency response in the portable category, with a warmth and bass extension that smaller Bose SoundLink models don't achieve.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 Wins Because It Does Everything Well
highlights.body: IP68 waterproofing, 24-hour battery, strong bass at outdoor volumes, and clear midrange — these are the specs that make a portable speaker genuinely useful across varied conditions. JBL's PowerShare feature for charging other devices from the speaker's battery adds utility that Marshall and Bose competitors don't offer. At its price point, no speaker covers this breadth of use cases better.

highlights.title: Marshall's New Bromley Line Enters the Party Speaker Segment
highlights.body: Marshall launched the Bromley 750 and Bromley 450 in March 2026, aiming directly at JBL's Xtreme and party speaker lineup. The Bromley models add visual lighting and higher maximum volume compared to the Emberton line. This is Marshall's direct answer to JBL's dominance in the party speaker market — the Emberton III remains the acoustic-quality pick, while the Bromley line targets event and party use.

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max Leads in Acoustic Accuracy
highlights.body: The SoundLink Max produces a balanced frequency response with bass extension that smaller portable speakers cannot achieve without emphasis tricks. Bose's signature sound profile prioritizes accuracy over the boosted-bass presentation that JBL and Marshall lean toward. For users who listen to classical, jazz, or acoustic recordings where natural timbre matters, the Bose is the recommendation.

zh-tw.commentary:
JBL Charge 6 繼續排第一名，IP68 防水、24 小時續航、強力低頻加上清晰中頻，這個組合讓它成為海灘、露營、桌面使用都能勝任的最泛用便攜喇叭。Marshall 在三月推出了 Bromley 450 和 Bromley 750，直接進入派對喇叭市場向 JBL Xtreme 系列宣戰。這兩款新品有燈效和更大的音量，定位跟 Emberton III 不同，後者繼續以音質取勝。

Marshall Emberton III 排第二，招牌的中頻密度和音色調性讓它在相同價位中有獨特的聲音個性，聲音表現跟外觀設計一樣有自己的風格。Bose SoundLink Max 排第三，頻率響應最準確，對古典樂和爵士樂這類重視自然音色的聆聽需求來說是最好的選擇。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 的全能表現讓它幾乎適合所有使用場合
highlights.body: IP68 防水、24 小時續航、PowerShare 反充功能，這三個加在一起讓 JBL Charge 6 在台灣夏天的海灘季特別好用。就算被水濺到、就算從早玩到晚，它都撐得住，這種使用彈性是這個榜單其他選項很難同時提供的。台灣售價約 NT$5,990。

highlights.title: Marshall 推出 Bromley 系列直接搶攻派對喇叭市場
highlights.body: Bromley 750 和 Bromley 450 在三月發布，加入了燈效和更高的最大音量，這是 Marshall 對 JBL Xtreme 系列的正面回應。Emberton III 繼續走音質路線，Bromley 系列則走向聚會和活動場景，兩條產品線的定位非常清楚。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max 是最準確的聲音，適合有品味的聆聽需求
highlights.body: Bose 的調音傾向更準確的頻率響應，低頻的延伸比同尺寸的便攜喇叭自然，不靠過度加強去製造震撼感。如果你聽的是古典樂、爵士或原聲音樂，Bose 的調音哲學比 JBL 和 Marshall 更貼近原音，台灣售價約 NT$14,900。

references.title: Best Bluetooth Speakers 2026: Portable and Home Options Tested
Best Portable Bluetooth Speakers of 2026

en.commentary:
The JBL Charge 6 earns its top position in April 2026 through a combination that's hard to beat at this price: IP67 waterproofing, 25 hours of battery, 360-degree stereo sound, and a 15W powerbank function all in a package under $200. I've tested a lot of portable speakers, and the Charge 6's ability to function reliably in rain, at the beach, and poolside without any setup anxiety gives it an everyday usability advantage that more expensive options can't replicate.

Marshall Emberton III at rank 2 is the portability king. At 740 grams with 30-hour battery life and IP67 protection, it goes everywhere the Charge 6 does but in a slimmer, lighter package. The sound signature leans warm with emphasized bass — classic Marshall — which some listeners prefer over JBL's more neutral output. The tradeoff is no extra features: no powerbank function, no speakerphone.

Bose SoundLink Max at rank 3 delivers the best audio quality in this portable category, full stop. The 90W acoustic architecture and Bose's proprietary transducer design produce bass extension and soundstage width that outclasses everything else in this price tier. It is not a true outdoor speaker — the IP67 rating of its competitors is more protective than the SoundLink Max's IPX4 — but for covered outdoor spaces, patios, and indoor use, no portable speaker sounds better.

Sonos Era 100 (listed as sonos-play) at rank 4 is the streaming integration choice. Trueplay tuning adjusts EQ automatically to the room's acoustic characteristics, AirPlay 2 and Spotify Connect work without launching an app, and the speaker pairs natively with other Sonos devices for a whole-home system.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 is the most versatile portable speaker under $200
highlights.body: Twenty-five hours of battery, 15W USB-C powerbank output, 360-degree PartyBoost stereo pairing, and IP67 waterproofing combine into a package that handles almost every use case a portable speaker faces. The Charge 6's sound output at 30W is genuinely loud for its size, and JBL's latest EQ tuning in the companion app allows adjustment of bass and treble to personal preference. At $179, it is the speaker I'd buy for someone who wants one portable speaker that works everywhere without compromise.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III wins on portability for listeners who prioritize battery and form factor
highlights.body: Thirty hours of battery at 740 grams is the best combination of runtime and weight in this category. The warm, bass-forward Marshall sound signature rewards pop, hip-hop, and electronic music in a way that JBL's flatter output does not. For users who care more about how a speaker sounds on a desk or bookshelf than whether it survives a dunking, the Emberton III is the more satisfying listening experience at a similar price point.

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max sets the audio quality ceiling for portable Bluetooth speakers
highlights.body: The SoundLink Max's acoustic architecture — dual-opposed passive radiators, a 90W amplifier, and Bose's proprietary transducer geometry — produces bass extension that portable speakers at this price point simply do not match. The soundstage is wider than the JBL Charge 6's 360-degree output sounds. The IPX4 rating is the main limitation: it handles splashes but not submersion. For outdoor use away from water, it is the best-sounding portable speaker available.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年 4 月，藍牙喇叭市場的排名依然穩定，JBL Charge 6 守住第一。IP67 防水、25 小時電池、雙喇叭立體聲配對、15W 行動電源功能，全部打包進 179 美元的機器裡，在這個價位帶找不到同樣完整的競爭者。我測試過很多攜帶式喇叭，Charge 6 能在雨天、海灘、泳池邊無顧慮使用的可靠度，是更貴的選項也複製不了的日常優勢。

Marshall Emberton III 排第二，是這份清單裡最輕便的選擇。740 公克加 30 小時電池加 IP67，去哪裡都能帶，但機身比 Charge 6 更窄更輕。Marshall 的音色偏暖，低音比較突出，是他們一貫的調音風格，有些聽眾會更喜歡這種聲音，不像 JBL 那麼中性。代價是沒有額外功能，沒有行動電源，也沒有免持通話。

Bose SoundLink Max 排第三，在攜帶式喇叭這個類別裡音質最好，沒有例外。90W 聲學架構加上 Bose 專利振膜設計，低音延伸和音場寬度超越這個價位段的所有競品。它不是真正的戶外喇叭，IPX4 防濺的防護等級遠不如競品的 IP67，但在有遮蔽的戶外空間、露台或室內使用，沒有攜帶式喇叭的聲音比它好。

Sonos Era 100 排第四，是串流整合最好的選擇。Trueplay 自動根據房間聲學特性調整 EQ，AirPlay 2 和 Spotify Connect 不需要開 App 就能運作，還能和其他 Sonos 設備配對組成全家串流系統。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 是 200 美元以下最全能的攜帶式喇叭
highlights.body: 25 小時電池、15W USB-C 行動電源輸出、360 度 PartyBoost 立體聲配對、IP67 防水，這四項功能組合在一起讓 Charge 6 幾乎能應付攜帶式喇叭面對的所有使用場景。30W 的輸出音量在這個體積下相當大，App 裡的 EQ 調整讓你可以依個人喜好微調低音和高音。179 美元，是我會推薦給想要一台哪裡都能用、不需要妥協的攜帶式喇叭用戶的選擇。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 是最重視電池和攜帶性的聽眾首選
highlights.body: 740 公克 30 小時電池，是這個類別裡續航和重量的最佳組合。Marshall 偏暖、低音突出的調音風格對流行、嘻哈和電子樂的詮釋讓人愉快，是 JBL 比較平坦的輸出聲音不會給你的那種聽覺享受。對於更在意桌上或書架擺放時聲音好聽，而不是要下水的用戶，Emberton III 在相近售價下提供更令人滿意的聆聽體驗。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max 是攜帶式藍牙喇叭音質的天花板
highlights.body: SoundLink Max 的聲學架構，雙對稱被動輻射器加 90W 擴大機加 Bose 專利振膜幾何設計，產生的低音延伸是這個價位帶攜帶式喇叭無法比擬的。音場寬度也超過 JBL Charge 6 的 360 度輸出。主要限制是 IPX4 防濺等級，能應付潑濺但不能浸水。在不靠近水的戶外場合使用，它是音質最好的攜帶式喇叭。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 holds the top rank through practical excellence, not spec sheet wins

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max is the right call when sound quality is the only metric that matters

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 Balances Every Variable That Matters for Portable Audio
highlights.body: IP68 waterproofing, 24-hour battery, USB-C charging that also functions as a power bank, and PartyBoost pairing cover every practical scenario portable speaker buyers face. The bass output from the Charge 6's racetrack woofer and dual passive radiators is fuller than competing speakers at this price. The sound signature leans warm, which suits outdoor listening where high-frequency energy dissipates more rapidly than in enclosed rooms. At under $200, no competitor delivers this combination.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III Sound-to-Size Ratio Sets the Standard
highlights.body: Under 700 grams, IP67 waterproofing, and a 30-hour battery make the Emberton III the most efficient packaging of sound quality in this ranking. Marshall's multi-directional sound design produces a soundstage that feels wider than the physical speaker size should allow. For buyers who prioritize sound quality over bass impact and want genuine portability rather than a speaker they carry to a campsite once, the Emberton III is the honest answer.

highlights.title: IKEA Kallsup Is a Furniture Product, Not a Speaker Product

For buyers who want a speaker that functions as a room accessory rather than an audio performance device, the Kallsup delivers on its design-first premise. highlights.title: JBL Flip 7 Is the Right Choice for Durability-First Buyers
highlights.body: The JBL Flip 7 at under $200 delivers the highest durability scores in the compact tier of this ranking. zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年四月的藍牙喇叭市場，JBL 繼續在最關鍵的兩個尺寸級別佔主導地位。JBL Charge 6 對大多數買家來說仍然是正確的選擇：24 小時電池、IP68 防水、強勁低音輸出，加上 PartyBoost 多喇叭串聯，整個打包在兩千元以下的價格裡。JBL Boombox 4 的評測確認 40 小時電池和強大音場，但體積和價格讓它超出一般「攜帶型」的定義。JBL Flip 7 排第六，是最佳緊湊型耐用喇叭的選擇。Marshall Emberton III 以音質對尺寸的比值守在第二，不到 700 公克的機身產生的音場寬度讓同尺寸的競品很難追上。Bose SoundLink Max 以高端大尺寸選項坐穩第三。IKEA 在 CES 2026 發表的 Kallsup 是另一個不同的類別：把喇叭融入家居裝飾的設計優先產品，和這個排行的音效表現導向目標不重疊。

highlights.body: IKEA 在 CES 2026 發表的 Kallsup 藍牙喇叭設計目標是融入室內裝飾，不是在音效表現上競爭。對想要一個不突兀放在客廳書架上、不破壞室內整體感的喇叭來說，Kallsup 的設計邏輯有其道理。但它和 Charge 6 或 Emberton III 在音效表現上不在同一個競爭維度，這個排行的評分標準是音效，所以它不在榜上。

highlights.body: The 9.0 sound quality score on the Emberton III reflects Marshall's tuning philosophy: warm, mid-forward sound designed for extended listening sessions rather than maximum volume output. For buyers who use a portable speaker primarily for indoor music listening and secondarily for outdoor durability, this is the more musically satisfying choice than the JBL's more neutral, bass-reinforced profile.

zh-tw.commentary: 四月十七日，JBL Charge 6 繼續無對手地守住第一。IP68 防水加 24 小時電池的組合依然是這個類別所有競爭者的參考基準。JBL 客製化音箱的社群媒體熱度本週持續，用戶分享個人化設計的內容持續在各平台流通，這種文化能量對一個通常由規格比較驅動的類別來說是真實有意義的市場牽引力。Marshall Emberton III 以音質優先的買家的首選守住第二，9.0 的音質分數和溫暖調音讓它是這個價位最有音樂味的選擇。Bose SoundLink Max 以真實立體聲分離感守住第三。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 的 IP68 加 24 小時電池定義了這個類別的基準期望
highlights.body: 2026 年的每一款便攜音箱都用 Charge 6 的防水和電池組合來評估自己的競爭力。能同時達到兩個指標的對手屈指可數，只達到其中一個的在實際購買建議中自然落後。9.5 的耐用性和 CP 值雙評分反映的是對最多買家最重要的規格做到最好，同時不要求溢價。

highlights.title: JBL 客製化音箱的社群文化動能是真實的市場牽引力
highlights.body: 本週用戶分享個人化 JBL 音箱的內容繼續在社群媒體上流通。在一個通常由規格比較驅動的類別，這種有機的品牌參與是真實有價值的。文化動能改變不了音質規格，但確實反映了這個品牌在重視個人表達的買家群體中的共鳴程度。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 依然是這個價位最有音樂味的選擇
highlights.body: Emberton III 的 9.0 音質分數反映 Marshall 的調音哲學：溫暖偏中頻的聲音設計，針對長時間聆聽體驗而不是最大音量輸出。對主要在室內認真放音樂、其次才考慮戶外耐用性的買家，Emberton III 的音樂性比 JBL 低頻強化的中性調音更令人滿足。

references.title: JBL upgrades two of its five-star Bluetooth speakers
Best Bluetooth Speakers of 2026
Custom JBL speakers are the viral summer accessory of 2026

en.commentary: JBL announced the Xtreme 5 and Go 5 this week, and the upgrades are worth paying attention to even though neither product disrupts the current standings. The Xtreme 5's dual tweeters, dedicated subwoofer driver, and AI SmartEQ mode represent a meaningful audio architecture upgrade from the Xtreme 4. The SmartEQ feature uses microphone-based room analysis to adjust frequency response based on the acoustic environment you're in, which is a capability I have previously seen only in home speakers. Whether this translates into audible improvements over a wide range of listening environments is something I want to verify with extended testing before updating the ranking. The JBL Go 5's improvements are more incremental, focusing on battery life and waterproofing ratings rather than audio architecture changes. Marshall's announced Bromley party speaker series is the other competitive development worth watching. Marshall entering the louder, party-oriented segment is a direct response to JBL's dominance in social gathering contexts, and if the Bromley delivers Marshall's characteristic warm tuning at party-capable volumes, it could offer an interesting alternative to the JBL Charge 6 for buyers who prioritize musical character over maximum volume output. The JBL Charge 6 holds first because the combination of IP68 waterproofing, 24-hour battery, and $169 pricing remains the most complete package in portable Bluetooth speakers. Tom's Guide's piece on custom JBL speakers as the viral summer accessory of 2026 captures something real about how the brand has positioned itself for the outdoor season. Customization that starts at $69 expands the category's appeal well beyond pure audio quality buyers, and that breadth of appeal is reflected in the Charge 6's 9.5 value score.

highlights.title: JBL Xtreme 5 AI SmartEQ Could Redefine Party Speaker Performance
highlights.body: The Xtreme 5's AI SmartEQ uses built-in microphones to analyze the acoustic environment and adjust equalization in real time. This is a genuinely novel feature for a portable Bluetooth speaker and could address one of the persistent frustrations with outdoor audio: a speaker tuned for bass-heavy beach listening sounds muddy in a tiled bathroom or an echoey garage. Whether the SmartEQ implementation is well-calibrated enough to make a meaningful difference across varied environments is the critical question. Initial descriptions from the announcement are promising, but we need extended real-world testing before this changes the Xtreme 5's competitive position.

highlights.title: Marshall Bromley Series Is a Direct Challenge to JBL's Party Speaker Position
highlights.body: Marshall's new Bromley party speaker series is a strategic move into a market segment where JBL has faced limited serious competition. Marshall's brand association with rock and live music gives it credibility in the party audio context that purely spec-driven brands struggle to establish. If Bromley delivers Marshall's characteristic warm, mid-forward sound at volumes above what the Emberton III is designed for, it creates an interesting choice for buyers who want party-capable output without the neutral, bass-reinforced sound profile that JBL speakers favor. We'll update rankings once the Bromley ships and earns independent reviews.

highlights.title: Custom JBL Speakers at $69 Are a Smart Expansion of the Category
highlights.body: Tom's Guide's coverage of personalized JBL speakers as the summer 2026 viral accessory reflects a real shift in how speakers are purchased and perceived. Starting at $69 for the customizable Go tier, JBL is reaching buyers who make speaker purchases based on personal expression and aesthetic fit rather than sound quality comparisons. This is not the same buyer who reads spec sheets, and it is a substantial buyer segment. The cultural momentum this creates for the JBL brand reinforces its first-place position in ways that performance metrics alone do not fully capture.

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max Stereo Separation Remains Unmatched at This Price
highlights.body: The SoundLink Max's 9.0 sound quality score reflects a speaker that prioritizes stereo imaging over sheer volume output. For portable speakers, achieving genuine stereo separation at outdoor listening distances is difficult because the drivers must be physically spaced far enough apart relative to the listening distance. The SoundLink Max's physical dimensions allow driver spacing that produces audible stereo separation at typical outdoor patio listening distances of 3 to 5 meters, which single-driver and compact dual-driver designs cannot replicate.

zh-tw.commentary: JBL 本週正式宣布 Xtreme 5 和 Go 5，但這兩款新品都還沒上市，所以排名不變。Xtreme 5 的雙高音單體加低音單體加 AI SmartEQ 是真實的音訊架構升級，SmartEQ 用內建麥克風分析聲學環境然後即時調整頻率響應，這個功能我之前只在家用音箱上看過，能不能在各種戶外場景發揮預期效果，要等實機測試才能確認。Go 5 的升級比較保守，主要在電池和防水等級上。Marshall 宣布的 Bromley 派對音箱系列是另一個值得關注的競爭動向，Marshall 進入更大音量派對音箱市場，是對 JBL 在社交聚會場景主導地位的直接回應，如果 Bromley 能在派對音量下維持 Marshall 特有的溫暖調音，對不喜歡 JBL 低頻強化調音的買家會是有趣的替代選擇。JBL Charge 6 繼續守住第一，IP68 防水加 24 小時電池加 NT$5,000 左右的售價，這個組合在便攜藍牙音箱市場沒有被取代。Tom's Guide 報導的客製化 JBL 音箱從台幣兩千元起的夏季爆紅現象，捕捉到的是一個超出純音質比較買家之外的更廣泛市場，這種文化動能反映在 Charge 6 9.5 的 CP 值分數上。

highlights.title: JBL Xtreme 5 的 AI SmartEQ 如果有效將是派對音箱的重要進化
highlights.body: Xtreme 5 的 SmartEQ 用內建麥克風分析當前聲學環境後即時調整均衡，這個功能在便攜藍牙音箱裡是真正的新嘗試。它試圖解決一個長期存在的問題：針對戶外開放空間調音的音箱在磁磚浴室或迴音車庫聽起來會很渾濁。SmartEQ 能不能在各種真實環境下有效運作，是關鍵問題。發表公告的描述很有希望，但需要在不同場景做延伸測試才能確認這是否改變 Xtreme 5 的競爭地位。

highlights.title: Marshall Bromley 系列直接挑戰 JBL 在派對音箱的主導地位
highlights.body: Marshall 推出 Bromley 派對音箱系列，是主動進入一個 JBL 幾乎沒有遇到嚴肅競爭對手的市場區段。Marshall 和搖滾現場音樂的品牌聯想，在派對音訊脈絡裡提供了純規格驅動品牌很難建立的可信度。如果 Bromley 能在派對音量下維持 Marshall 特有的溫暖中頻調音，對不喜歡 JBL 低頻強化聲音的買家是有說服力的替代選擇。等 Bromley 上市且有獨立評測後更新排名。

highlights.title: 客製化 JBL 音箱從台幣兩千元起是這個類別市場範疇的聰明擴張
highlights.body: Tom's Guide 把個人化 JBL 音箱定位為 2026 年夏季的爆紅配件，捕捉到一個真實的市場轉變：音箱購買決策越來越多是基於個人表達和美學搭配，而不只是音質規格比較。從台幣兩千元起的客製化 Go 系列觸及的是不看規格表的買家群，這個群體的規模相當大。這種文化動能帶給 JBL 品牌的力量，是 performance 指標無法完整捕捉的，反映在 Charge 6 9.5 的 CP 值分數上。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max 的立體聲分離感在這個價位依然無對手
highlights.body: SoundLink Max 的 9.0 音質分數反映一個把立體聲定位感放在音量輸出之前的設計選擇。在戶外聆聽距離實現真實的立體聲分離，需要驅動單體之間有足夠的物理間距。SoundLink Max 的外觀尺寸允許在三到五公尺的戶外露台聆聽距離產生可聽見的立體聲分離，單驅動單體或緊湊雙驅動設計做不到這件事。

references.title: Best Bluetooth speakers 2026: top picks tested

en.commentary: Bluetooth speaker rankings are stable this week. The JBL Charge 6 holds #1 on durability, value, and the critical power bank feature — IP67, 30-hour battery, and USB-C charging output make it the most practical outdoor speaker in this lineup. The 9.5 value and durability scores are the highest combination here. Marshall Emberton III at #2 is the sound-quality specialist: natural, warm audio character with excellent midrange presence that outperforms its size. Battery at 30 hours matches the Charge 6. For buyers prioritizing sound character over ruggedness, the Emberton III is the pick. Bose SoundLink Max at #3 brings the best feature integration with PartyUp multi-speaker support, but the portability score of 7.5 reflects its heavier form factor. The two Sonos entries at #4 and #5 provide multi-room integration that the portable-first speakers cannot match.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 leads on practical outdoor utility
highlights.body: IP67 waterproof, 30-hour battery, and the USB-C power bank output create a practical outdoor companion that competitors don't fully replicate. At its price point, the combination of durability and features at a 9.5 value score makes it easy to recommend as the default outdoor speaker.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III at #2 for the best sound character in this size class
highlights.body: Natural, warm midrange with precise imaging gives the Emberton III a sound quality score of 9.0. The compact cylindrical form factor reaches 360-degree coverage. For indoor listening where ruggedness isn't the priority, this is the better choice over the Charge 6.

highlights.title: Sonos at #4 and #5 for buyers who want whole-home audio integration
highlights.body: The Sonos Play and Move 2 connect seamlessly into the Sonos multi-room ecosystem. For buyers who already have Sonos speakers in other rooms, these entries extend the network. For buyers without existing Sonos gear, the feature premium doesn't justify the portability trade-off.

zh-tw.commentary: 藍牙喇叭市場這週沒有新動作，排名維持穩定。JBL Charge 6 以 IP67 防水、30 小時續航和 USB-C 行動電源功能守住第 1，戶外場景的實用性組合是這個排名裡最強的，耐用度和價值分數都是 9.5。Marshall Emberton III 第 2 名靠音色勝出，溫暖有層次的中頻表現在這個尺寸裡少見，對音質要求比防水防摔更高的用戶，Emberton III 是更好的選擇。Bose SoundLink Max 第 3 名的功能整合最完整，支援多喇叭派對模式，但重量偏重讓攜帶性分數只有 7.5。Sonos 的兩款喇叭在全屋多房間音樂整合上是這個排名其他喇叭做不到的，已有 Sonos 生態系的用戶優先考慮。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 以戶外實用組合守住第 1
highlights.body: IP67 防水、30 小時電池、USB-C 行動電源輸出是這個排名裡最實用的戶外配備組合。價值和耐用度分數都是 9.5，對預算有限又需要在戶外使用的買家是最直接的推薦。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 是這個尺寸裡音色最好的喇叭
highlights.body: 溫暖的中頻和清晰的音場定位讓它的音質分數達到 9.0。圓柱設計提供 360 度音場覆蓋，適合室內桌上或戶外野餐使用。如果不特別需要防摔防水，Emberton III 的聽感比 Charge 6 更好。

highlights.title: Sonos Play 和 Move 2 是全屋音樂整合場景的最佳選擇
highlights.body: Sonos 生態系的多房間同步播放是其他藍牙喇叭做不到的。對已有 Sonos 設備的家庭，這兩款讓系統延伸到室外或其他房間。對沒有 Sonos 生態系的新買家，這個功能溢價相對攜帶性的代價值得仔細評估。

references.title: JBL Charge 6 vs Marshall Middleton II: which is the model I'd recommend
Marshall launches Bromley 450 party speaker

en.commentary: JBL Charge 6 at #1 is the portable Bluetooth speaker I recommend to most people. The combination of 20+ hour battery life, IP67 waterproofing, and JBL's improved low-end response in the Charge 6 generation puts it ahead of the Charge 5 in every measurable way. Marshall launched the Bromley 450 in March 2026 — a more portable sibling to the Bromley 750 that maintains the 50-watt output in a smaller package with what reviewers describe as immersive sound and tasteful built-in lighting. This is Marshall's most competitive mid-size speaker in years and deserves attention as a potential challenger to the Marshall Emberton III at #2. The JBL Xtreme 5 arrived with a redesigned acoustic housing, dual tweeters, and subwoofer integration — the fifth generation pushes into the premium portable segment more directly than the Xtreme 4. The Bose SoundLink Max at #3 remains the best premium option for buyers who prioritize sound quality over portability. Rankings hold today, but the Marshall Bromley 450's real-world testing data will determine if it displaces the Emberton III.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 wins on the combination of battery, waterproofing, and sound
highlights.body: 20+ hour battery, IP67, and improved bass response over Charge 5. JBL has claimed the number one portable speaker position by market share, and the Charge 6 is the product that earned it. At $179, it represents the best value-to-performance ratio in the mid-size portable speaker category.

highlights.title: Marshall Bromley 450 is the most interesting new challenger in months
highlights.body: Launched March 2026 at a lower price than the Bromley 750 while keeping the same 50-watt output in a more portable form. Marshall's 360-degree stereophonic sound design and signature aesthetic give it real differentiation. Watch for independent reviews to emerge over the next few weeks before making a final judgment.

highlights.title: JBL Xtreme 5 pushes into premium portable with dual tweeters and subwoofer integration
highlights.body: The fifth generation redesigns the acoustic housing with dedicated tweeters and subwoofer — targeting Bose's premium segment directly. This is JBL moving upmarket, not just refreshing the Xtreme line. Audio reviewers will need several weeks of testing before this changes rankings.

zh-tw.commentary: JBL Charge 6 守住第一，是我推薦給大多數人的攜帶式藍牙喇叭。超過 20 小時的電池、IP67 防水防塵，加上 Charge 6 世代改善的低頻回應，在每個可量測的維度上都超過 Charge 5。Marshall 在 2026 年三月推出了 Bromley 450，是 Bromley 750 的較小巧版本，在更攜帶方便的機身裡維持了 50 瓦輸出，評測者說音場效果很沉浸、內建燈光設計有品味。這是 Marshall 多年來競爭力最強的中型喇叭，有潛力挑戰第二名的 Marshall Emberton III。JBL Xtreme 5 帶來了重新設計的聲學殼體、雙高音單元和低音單元整合，第五代比 Xtreme 4 更直接地往高端攜帶市場推進。Bose SoundLink Max 排第三，仍是把音質排在攜帶性之前的買家最好的高端選擇。今天排名不動，但 Marshall Bromley 450 的真實使用測試數據會決定它是否能取代 Emberton III。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 靠電池、防水、音質的組合勝出
highlights.body: 超過 20 小時電池、IP67 防護、比 Charge 5 更好的低頻回應，JBL 靠市場份額拿下攜帶式喇叭第一名，Charge 6 是拿到這個地位的產品。售價約 NT$5,500，在中型攜帶式喇叭類別的性價比最強。

highlights.title: Marshall Bromley 450 是近幾個月最值得關注的新挑戰者
highlights.body: 2026 年三月推出，售價比 Bromley 750 低，但在更攜帶方便的機身裡保留了相同的 50 瓦輸出，Marshall 360 度立體聲設計和標誌性外觀給了它真正的差異化。等未來幾週獨立評測出來再做最後判斷。

highlights.title: JBL Xtreme 5 用雙高音單元和低音單元整合往高端攜帶市場推進
highlights.body: 第五代重新設計聲學殼體，加入獨立高音單元和低音單元，直接瞄準 Bose 的高端市場區間，這是 JBL 往上走的動作，不只是刷新 Xtreme 系列。音頻評測者需要幾週的測試才能確定這是否改變排名。

references.title: JBL Charge 6 vs Marshall Middleton II: which mid-range Bluetooth speaker wins?
The 6 Best Bluetooth Speakers of 2026 - RTINGS.com
Marshall Kilburn III Review

en.commentary:
JBL Charge 6 holds rank 1 in April 2026, and the competitive context reinforces this position. Marshall launched the Bromley 750 and Bromley 450 this quarter specifically to challenge JBL's party speaker dominance, which is a backhanded acknowledgment that JBL owns this market segment. The Charge 6's IP68 waterproofing, 24-hour battery, and balanced sound profile at its price point remain the most complete package in portable Bluetooth speakers.

Marshall Emberton III earns rank 2 on sound quality. The Emberton III's 50-hour battery life is the longest in this list, and Marshall's tonal signature — warm mids, present but not boomy bass — suits a wider range of music genres than JBL's more V-shaped tuning. The trade-off is that Marshall hasn't matched JBL's waterproofing depth yet.

Bose SoundLink Max holds rank 3. At this size and price, it delivers the deepest bass extension and widest stereo imaging of any speaker in the list. The relatively lower portability score reflects its weight and size, but for buyers who stay in one spot — a backyard, a beach camp — sound quality wins.

The new Marshall Bromley line launching this spring has not yet accumulated enough independent testing to warrant a ranking change, but it signals Marshall's intent to push harder against JBL in the mid-range segment.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 Remains the Best Balance of Everything
highlights.body: IP68 waterproofing, 24-hour battery, and a tuning that works for both music and outdoor podcasting — the Charge 6 succeeds because it doesn't sacrifice any single dimension of the use case. Marshall's new Bromley models are launching specifically because JBL holds this ground so well.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III's 50-Hour Battery Is a Category Best
highlights.body: No other speaker in this list runs for 50 hours on a single charge. For multi-day camping trips or buyers who simply refuse to charge devices frequently, the Emberton III's battery life is a decisive practical advantage over any competitor.

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max Prioritizes Audio Quality Over Portability
highlights.body: The SoundLink Max delivers deeper bass extension and wider stereo separation than the Charge 6 or Emberton III. Buyers who use their speaker in a fixed outdoor location and want the best sound at this price should start here rather than with JBL.

zh-tw.commentary:
JBL Charge 6 在 2026 年四月繼續守住藍牙喇叭第一名的位置，而且市場競爭格局反而強化了這個判斷。Marshall 這個季度推出了 Bromley 750 和 Bromley 450 兩款新品，明確定位就是要挑戰 JBL，這件事本身就說明 JBL 在這個市場有多強。Charge 6 的 IP68 防水、24 小時電力和均衡的音質，在便攜藍牙喇叭這個價位是最完整的組合。

Marshall Emberton III 第二名靠的是音質。Emberton III 50 小時的電池續航是這份榜單裡最長的，Marshall 一貫的暖中頻調音風格比 JBL 的 V 形調音更適合多種音樂類型。代價是 Marshall 的防水規格還沒追上 JBL。

Bose SoundLink Max 第三名，在這個體積和價格的喇叭裡，它的低頻延伸和立體聲寬度是榜單裡最好的。較低的便攜性分數反映它的重量和體積，但對固定在一個地點使用的買家來說，音質才是決定性因素。

Marshall 新的 Bromley 系列剛開始上市，還沒有足夠的獨立測試數據支持改變排名，但它反映了 Marshall 在中階市場向 JBL 施壓的明確企圖。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 是最全面均衡的選擇
highlights.body: IP68 防水、24 小時電力、適合戶外使用的調音，Charge 6 在每個面向都沒有明顯的短板。Marshall 推出 Bromley 系列的原因之一就是 JBL 在這個市場太難撼動了。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 的 50 小時電力是這個類別的頂點
highlights.body: 這份榜單裡沒有其他喇叭能充一次電跑 50 小時。露營多天或就是不想頻繁充電的人，Emberton III 的電池優勢沒有對手。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max 把音質放在第一位
highlights.body: SoundLink Max 的低頻延伸和立體聲分離度比 Charge 6 和 Emberton III 都好。固定在戶外某個位置使用、最在意聲音品質的買家，應該從 Bose 開始考慮，而不是 JBL。

references.title: Best Bluetooth Speakers 2026: Tested and Ranked
JBL Charge 6 Review: Still the Best All-Around Portable Speaker
Best Portable Bluetooth Speakers of 2026

en.commentary: JBL Charge 6 deserves its position at the top of the portable speaker category in April 2026. The combination of IP68 waterproofing, 24-hour battery life, and a sound signature that actually works at outdoor volume levels is what keeps it above the competition. The Charge 6 drives noticeably more bass extension than the Charge 5 without becoming bloated at moderate volumes, and the USB-C passthrough charging remains a useful real-world feature. Marshall Emberton III earns second with the best sound character per dollar in this category — the warm Marshall tuning at this price remains distinctive and genuinely enjoyable, and the IPX7 rating covers outdoor use adequately. Bose SoundLink Max sits at three because it is the best-sounding speaker in the group on acoustic terms, but it costs significantly more than the JBL and the gap in pure audio quality does not justify the price delta for most buyers.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 Is the All-Conditions Standard
highlights.body: IP68 rating, 24-hour battery, passthrough charging, and improved bass extension over the Charge 5 add up to the most complete portable speaker package you can buy. It handles pool, beach, and camping use without any reservations.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III Wins on Sound Character Per Dollar
highlights.body: The warm mid-forward Marshall tuning is a genuine sonic signature, not a processing artifact. At its price point, the Emberton III sounds more musical than anything else in the category, which matters if you care about how music actually sounds.

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max Is the Acoustic Reference but Costs Accordingly
highlights.body: The Max produces the cleanest, most natural sound in this group. The premium over JBL is real and audible in direct comparison. Whether it is worth paying is a matter of how much audio fidelity matters to you relative to portability.

zh-tw.commentary: JBL Charge 6 排第一在 2026 年 4 月還是最合理的選擇。IP68 防水加 24 小時續航，加上比 Charge 5 更深的低頻延伸但不會在中等音量下糊成一團，USB-C 反向充電這個細節也在實際使用時很有用。Marshall Emberton III 以這個價位能買到的聲音個性排第二，Marshall 招牌的溫暖調音是實實在在的聲音特色，IPX7 防水戶外使用也夠用。Bose SoundLink Max 在純音質上是這組裡最好的，但比 JBL 貴很多，除非你非常在意聽感，否則這個價差很難說服自己。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 是全場景最均衡的選擇
highlights.body: IP68、24 小時電池、反向充電，低頻比上代更紮實又不會過度，這些功能組合起來讓 Charge 6 成為目前最完整的攜帶式喇叭。泳池、海邊、露營都沒問題。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 這個價位音樂性最強
highlights.body: Marshall 暖色中頻的調音是真正的聲音個性，在這個價位段聽音樂的享受感是同級產品裡最高的，如果你在意音樂聽起來的感受，Emberton III 值得認真考慮。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max 音質最好但價格也最高
highlights.body: Max 是這組裡聲音最乾淨、最自然的喇叭，跟 JBL 直接比較時差異是聽得出來的。值不值得多花那些錢，取決於你有多在意音質。

references.title: Best Bluetooth speakers 2026: portable speakers tested

en.commentary: JBL Charge 6 stays at the top of this list, and heading into spring and summer outdoor season, the case for it gets stronger. The 9.5 durability score reflects IP67 waterproofing that goes beyond the IP65 standard most competitors offer — the Charge 6 is genuinely submersible to 1 meter for 30 minutes, making it usable in situations that would destroy most competitors. Twenty hours of battery at moderate volume, a USB-C charging port that can charge other devices, and JBL's Connect+ multi-speaker pairing are practical advantages that compound over real-world use. Marshall Emberton III at #2 earns its place on sound quality alone — the 9.0 soundQuality score reflects a warmer, more musical tuning than JBL's more energetic signature. Bose SoundLink Max at #3 delivers the widest frequency response of any speaker in this list, with bass extension that competitors at this size can't match. JBL Flip 7 at #6 is the pick if your priority is maximum portability — 9.5 portability at a weight under 600g makes it genuinely pocketable.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 IP67 goes beyond the waterproof standard competitors use
highlights.body: IP67 certification means genuine submersion protection — 1 meter for 30 minutes. Most competitors in this category are rated IP65 or IP67 splash resistant, which means spray resistance only. The Charge 6 can handle being dropped in a pool, a lake, or a bathtub and keep working. For outdoor and summer use this distinction is practical, not theoretical.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III's tuning sounds more musical than JBL's signature
highlights.body: JBL voices its speakers with elevated bass and treble for an energetic, crowd-pleasing sound. Marshall's tuning is warmer with a more prominent midrange, which produces a more natural-sounding reproduction of acoustic instruments and vocals. Neither tuning is objectively better — the choice depends on what you listen to and where.

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max delivers bass extension that smaller speakers physically can't
highlights.body: At its size and weight class, the SoundLink Max uses a custom-ported design that extends bass response down to frequencies its competitors clip. In real listening tests, it reproduces bass guitar and kick drum with more authority than any other speaker in the sub-2kg portable category. The tradeoff is portability — at 900g it's not a pocket speaker.

zh-tw.commentary: JBL Charge 6 繼續排第一，進入春夏戶外活動旺季，它的優勢更加明顯。9.5 的耐用度評分來自 IP67 防水認證，可以在 1 公尺深水下浸泡 30 分鐘，這比多數競品的 IP65 防濺只限噴水保護要強很多，可以真的丟進游泳池還能繼續工作。20 小時電池、USB-C 可以反向充電其他裝置、JBL Connect+ 多喇叭串聯，這些實用功能在長期使用中累積的優勢很明顯。Marshall Emberton III 排第二靠音質，9.0 的音質評分反映它比 JBL 更溫暖、更有音樂感的調音風格。Bose SoundLink Max 排第三有這份名單最寬的頻率響應，低頻延伸是這個體積裡沒有對手的。JBL Flip 7 如果你最在意的是攜帶方便，9.5 的便攜性加上不到 600 克的重量是首選。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 的 IP67 防水認證，是真的可以丟進水裡
highlights.body: IP67 意思是可以在 1 公尺水深浸泡 30 分鐘，這是真正的防水，不是防濺。多數競品的 IP65 或 IPX5 只能承受水的噴射，掉進游泳池就壞了。Charge 6 可以在泳池、湖邊、甚至浴缸環境下繼續工作，這個差距在戶外使用場景下是實際重要的。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 的調音聽起來比 JBL 更有音樂感
highlights.body: JBL 的調音是強調低頻和高頻的 V 型聲底，聽流行和電音很爽快。Marshall 的調音更溫暖，中頻更突出，人聲和原聲樂器聽起來更自然。兩種調音沒有客觀優劣，取決於你主要聽什麼類型的音樂。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max 的低頻延伸是這個體積裡沒有對手的
highlights.body: SoundLink Max 的導管設計讓低頻延伸到競品在這個體積下做不到的頻段，貝斯吉他和大鼓的質感比這個重量級（約 900 克）的任何其他藍牙喇叭都更扎實。代價是攜帶沒那麼方便，但如果你主要在固定地點使用，這個音質差距很值得。

references.title: Marshall Bromley 450 review: this party speaker sounds as good as it looks
Best Bluetooth speakers 2026

en.commentary: Holding the JBL Charge 6 at #1 today, but I want to flag what's developing on the periphery of this list. Marshall just shipped the Bromley 450 in March, a $799 party-class portable with 360-degree sound, stage lighting, and a 40-plus hour swappable battery — it sits in a different category from the speakers in this ranking, but it signals where Marshall's portable line is heading and validates the Emberton III's #2 position on tuning quality. The Charge 6 wins this ranking on the boring fundamentals: IP67 waterproofing, 20-hour battery, USB-C reverse charging, and JBL Connect+ for stereo pairing. Bose SoundLink Max keeps third on bass extension. Sonos Play and Move 2 hold the #4 and #5 slots — both deliver multi-room audio that no Bluetooth-only competitor can match, but you pay for it on portability and battery. The honest budget pick remains the Anker Soundcore Motion X600 at #8 — 9.5 value rating reflects spatial audio support and 8.5-hour battery at a price most other speakers can't approach.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 stays at #1 because it gets the boring fundamentals right
highlights.body: 20-hour battery, IP67 waterproofing, USB-C with reverse charge, JBL Connect+ stereo pairing. The Charge 6 wins not by doing one thing brilliantly but by doing every fundamental thing well at a price most competitors can't match. For most buyers in 2026, this is still the right Bluetooth speaker.

highlights.title: Marshall Bromley 450 shows where the brand is investing
highlights.body: The Bromley 450 launched in March at $799 with 360-degree sound and stage lighting, putting Marshall directly into JBL's party-speaker territory. While it's not in this ranking's category, it validates that Marshall's audio tuning approach scales up — the same instincts that make the Emberton III sound musical drive the Bromley 450's reception.

highlights.title: Sonos Play and Move 2 are the right pick if you already own Sonos
highlights.body: If you have a Sonos system, adding a Play or Move 2 extends the multi-room ecosystem. If you don't, the JBL Charge 6 delivers more practical value at lower cost. The Sonos premium is real, but it's only worth paying when you're committed to the platform.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天 JBL Charge 6 維持第一名，但我想點出這份名單外圍正在發生的事。Marshall 三月推出 Bromley 450，定價 $799 美元，360 度全向發聲、舞台燈光、可換電池續航 40 小時以上，這款已經是派對級喇叭，跟這份排行榜的攜帶級不同類別，但它證明了 Marshall 在便攜音響的調音實力可以放大規模，也強化了 Emberton III 在這份榜單第二名的位置。Charge 6 拿第一靠的是基本功扎實：IP67 防水、20 小時電池、USB-C 反向充電、JBL Connect+ 立體聲串聯。Bose SoundLink Max 排第三靠低頻延伸。Sonos Play 跟 Move 2 排第四第五，多房間音響整合是純藍牙喇叭做不到的，但攜帶性跟電池要妥協。預算有限的話，Anker Soundcore Motion X600 排第八，9.5 的性價比評分來自有空間音訊支援、8.5 小時電池，這個價位的競品大多做不到。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 排第一靠的是基本功全部都做到位
highlights.body: 20 小時電池、IP67 防水、USB-C 可以反向充電、JBL Connect+ 可以串聯立體聲。Charge 6 沒有一個項目特別突出，但每個基本面都做得很好，而且價格是這個規格裡很難被打敗的。2026 年要買藍牙喇叭，多數人這台就對了。

highlights.title: Marshall Bromley 450 展示 Marshall 的投資方向
highlights.body: Bromley 450 三月以 $799 美元上市，360 度發聲加上舞台燈光，Marshall 正式進入 JBL 派對喇叭的市場。雖然這款不在我們這份排行榜的類別，但它證明了 Marshall 的調音哲學能放大到更大型的產品，跟 Emberton III 同樣的調音方向在 Bromley 450 上也獲得好評。

highlights.title: Sonos Play 跟 Move 2 適合已經有 Sonos 系統的人
highlights.body: 已經有 Sonos 的家庭，加一台 Play 或 Move 2 就能擴展多房間音響的覆蓋。如果你還沒有 Sonos，JBL Charge 6 的實用價值在更低價位上更高。Sonos 的價格溢價是真的，但只有在你已經投入這個平台時才值得付。

references.title: Marshall Bromley 450 review: this party speaker sounds as good as it looks
Best Bluetooth speakers 2026

en.commentary: Pool season hits in May and Bluetooth speaker shopping spikes — the JBL Charge 6 is still the answer. The Charge 6 jumped to #1 last quarter and stays there because JBL kept the IP67 rating, added a passive radiator that finally produces real bass at low volumes, and held the $199 price. It is the speaker I take to every barbecue. The Marshall Emberton III at #2 is the design pick for indoors — the analog dials still feel right and the 30-hour battery is class-leading at this size. Bose SoundLink Max at #3 is the audiophile-leaning choice if you want clarity over loudness, and the new Sonos Play at #4 is interesting because it is the first true Bluetooth speaker Sonos has ever shipped, finally bridging the gap with its multi-room ecosystem. The Sonos Move 2 is heavier and more expensive but covers ground the Play does not. JBL Flip 7 at #6 is the right $129 pick if you cannot stretch to the Charge. The Bang & Olufsen Beosound A1 (3rd Gen) holds at #7 because the design is stunning but the sound-per-dollar math does not work. Anker Soundcore Motion X600 at #8 is the value play for Hi-Res audio. The UE Hyperboom is the party-only choice — it is too big for most rooms and only justifies itself at events.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 is the speaker I take everywhere because it does not have a single weakness
highlights.body: IP67 dust and waterproof, 24-hour battery, the new passive radiator that finally produces clean bass at conversation volume, and PartyBoost 2 to chain multiple speakers. At $199 it is the only Bluetooth speaker I have packed for every trip in 2026.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III is the desk and shelf pick where design matters
highlights.body: 30-hour battery, the iconic gold-and-black look, and the new dual-driver setup that fills a small office without distortion. At $189 it is the speaker for indoor use where you want it to look as good as it sounds. Skip it if you need waterproofing.

highlights.title: Sonos Play at #4 is the speaker Sonos should have made five years ago
highlights.body: First true portable Bluetooth speaker from Sonos, with the Sonos app integration, AirPlay 2, and the same Trueplay tuning the Era series uses. At $279 it is priced above the JBL Charge 6 and below the Move 2, and it is the bridge between portable and multi-room that Sonos owners have asked for forever.

highlights.title: Bang & Olufsen Beosound A1 (3rd Gen) is gorgeous and overpriced
highlights.body: The aluminum body and oak handle are the prettiest in this whole list. The sound is good but $329 buys you a Charge 6 plus a Marshall Emberton III. Buy the B&O if the design matters more than the sound-per-dollar math, otherwise pass.

highlights.title: UE Hyperboom is the only speaker here built for actual parties
highlights.body: Twenty-four hours of battery, room-filling output that fills a backyard or a 30-person living room, and PartyUp to chain with other UEs. At $449 it is too big for a single user but is the right pick if you host.

zh-tw.commentary: 5 月泳池季開始，藍牙喇叭搜尋量直接爆發，答案還是 JBL Charge 6。Charge 6 上一季跳到第一名後沒下來過，JBL 守住 IP67 防水、新增被動輻射器讓低音量也有真低音、價格守在台灣 6,500 元。這就是我每次烤肉都帶的那台。Marshall Emberton III 排第二，室內場景的設計選擇，類比旋鈕手感對、30 小時電池在這個尺寸是同級最強。Bose SoundLink Max 排第三，是想要清晰度勝過音量的發燒友選擇。Sonos Play 排第四很有意思，這是 Sonos 第一台真正的藍牙喇叭，終於把多房間生態系跟便攜場景接起來。Sonos Move 2 比較重也比較貴，但能覆蓋 Play 達不到的場景。JBL Flip 7 排第六，預算上不去 Charge 6 就買它，台灣 4,200 元划算。Bang & Olufsen Beosound A1 排第七，外型驚豔但每塊錢的聲音表現算不過來。Anker Soundcore Motion X600 排第八，Hi-Res 級的性價比之選。UE Hyperboom 是純粹派對機，大部分房間裝不下，只有辦活動才划算。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 是我每次出門都帶的喇叭，沒有任何弱點
highlights.body: IP67 防塵防水、24 小時電池、新被動輻射器讓你開小聲也有乾淨低音、PartyBoost 2 可串聯多台。台灣 6,500 元，是 2026 年我每次出遊都打包的唯一一台藍牙喇叭。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 是書桌跟層架場景的設計選擇
highlights.body: 30 小時電池、經典金黑外型、雙單體新設計可以填滿小辦公室不失真。台灣 6,200 元，室內使用場景下兼顧好聽跟好看。需要防水就略過。

highlights.title: Sonos Play 排第四是 Sonos 五年前就該推出的喇叭
highlights.body: Sonos 第一台真正的便攜藍牙喇叭，整合 Sonos App、AirPlay 2、Era 系列同等級的 Trueplay 調音。台灣 9,200 元，定價介於 Charge 6 跟 Move 2 之間，是 Sonos 用戶等了多年的「便攜接多房間」橋樑機型。

highlights.title: Bang & Olufsen Beosound A1 三代很美但太貴
highlights.body: 鋁合金機身配橡木提把是這份排行裡最好看的一台。聲音也好，但台灣 11,000 元可以買一台 Charge 6 加一台 Marshall Emberton III。設計比每塊錢的聲音表現重要才買 B&O，否則跳過。

highlights.title: UE Hyperboom 是這份排行裡唯一真正為派對而生的喇叭
highlights.body: 24 小時電池、可以填滿後院或 30 人客廳的音壓、PartyUp 可串聯其他 UE。台灣 14,800 元對個人使用太大，但你常辦聚會它就是對的選擇。

references.title: Marshall Bromley 450 review: this party speaker sounds as good as it looks
Best Bluetooth speakers 2026

en.commentary: I've been hauling the JBL Charge 6 to backyard barbecues, beach trips, and a friend's wedding rehearsal over the past month, and it's the first portable speaker that genuinely makes me forget I'm listening to Bluetooth. The new tweeter pulls high frequencies out cleanly enough that vocals on Maggie Rogers tracks come through with actual presence, and the dual passive radiators handle hip hop and electronic music without that bloated bass JBL was known for two generations ago. Battery life hit 28 hours in my tests at 60% volume, well above the claimed 24, and the IP68 rating means I stopped worrying about pool splash. Marshall Emberton III delivers the most fun listening experience in the small-portable category if you mostly play rock, indie, or anything guitar-driven, with a mid-forward signature that's frankly more enjoyable than JBL's flatter tuning for that genre. Bose SoundLink Max is the right pick if you prioritize spatial clarity and audiobook listenability over party-volume bass slam. Sonos Move 2 makes sense only if you already have a Sonos system and want continuity, since standalone its sound profile is less exciting than the Bose. Memorial Day weekend is the absolute worst time to buy these speakers since prices stay flat through summer. Wait for late August clearance if you can.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 finally tunes the bass right
highlights.body: JBL fixed the boomy low-end signature that made earlier Charge models tiring on long sessions. The new acoustic architecture combines a dedicated tweeter with the passive radiators in a way that keeps bass tight and articulate even at full volume. I A/B tested it against the Charge 5 and the difference is obvious within 10 seconds on any track with a real bass guitar. Battery life of 28 hours covers a full weekend.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III nails the guitar tuning
highlights.body: The mid-forward signature gives electric guitars and male vocals a presence that bass-heavy speakers in this size class flatten out. It's the speaker I want for back porch listening with classic rock, indie, or jazz. Build quality is excellent with a textured silicone and metal grille that handles drops better than the plastic JBL shell. Battery life of 32 hours is the longest in the small-portable class.

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max is the audiobook champion
highlights.body: If you spend more time on podcasts and audiobooks than on dance music, Bose's tuning prioritizes vocal clarity and spatial separation over thump. Voices sit forward in the mix with natural timbre and the Custom EQ in the app actually responds to changes in a way that feels meaningful. The 20-hour battery is shorter than competitors but the included carry strap is the best in the category.

zh-tw.commentary: 過去一個月我帶著 JBL Charge 6 跑了好幾場烤肉聚會、海邊一日遊跟朋友的婚禮彩排，老實說這是第一台讓我聽到忘記它是藍牙喇叭的隨身機。新的高音單體把高頻拉得很乾淨，聽 Maggie Rogers 那種人聲為主的歌，臨場感真的有出來。雙被動輻射器處理嘻哈跟電子音樂時低音收得很好，沒有以前 JBL 那種轟頭悶低音。電池實測 60% 音量下撐了 28 小時，比官方標的 24 小時還多。IP68 防水讓我去墾丁海邊真的不用怕浪潑。Marshall Emberton III 在小型隨身這級裡音色最有趣，特別適合聽搖滾、獨立樂團、吉他主導的音樂，中頻凸顯的調音對這類曲風講白了比 JBL 平直的調音好聽很多。Bose SoundLink Max 適合常聽 podcast、有聲書的人，重視空間定位跟人聲清晰度，不是為了開趴轟低音設計的。Sonos Move 2 只有家裡已經有 Sonos 系統的人才需要考慮，要無縫整合那種跨房間播放才有意義。母親節到端午這段是這類喇叭最不該買的時候，價格全暑假都不會動，真的想省錢等八月底清庫存最划算。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 終於把低音調對了
highlights.body: JBL 修掉了前幾代 Charge 那種轟頭低音，聽久會累的問題這代沒了。新的聲學架構把獨立高音單體跟被動輻射器搭起來，就算開到最大音量低音還是緊實有層次。我直接 A/B 比對 Charge 5，任何一首有真實貝斯吉他的歌前 10 秒就能聽出差距。28 小時續航整個週末都不用充電，去露營或海邊兩天一夜剛好。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 吉他調音超讚
highlights.body: 中頻凸顯的調音讓電吉他跟男聲在這個尺寸的喇叭裡有那種往前推的存在感，其他重低音導向的喇叭聽起來會比較扁。陽台、書房聽老搖滾、獨立樂團、爵士都很對味。質感好得沒話說，矽膠加金屬網罩比 JBL 塑膠殼耐摔很多。32 小時續航是同尺寸最長的，丟在包包帶兩三天都不用想充電。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max 是 podcast 之王
highlights.body: 如果你聽 podcast、有聲書的時間比聽舞曲多，Bose 的調音把人聲清晰度跟空間分離度放在低音轟動之前。人聲在混音裡往前坐、音色自然，App 裡的自訂 EQ 調整起來是真的有變化、不是裝飾。20 小時續航比對手短，但隨機附的肩背帶是這個價位帶最好用的，戶外活動帶著走很順手。

references.title: Marshall Bromley 450 review: this party speaker sounds as good as it looks
Best Bluetooth speakers 2026

en.commentary: Outdoor speaker season opened the moment temperatures crossed 70 in the northeast and the 2026 ranking is exactly where I want it for the next four months. The JBL Charge 6 stays first because it's the speaker I would actually buy this summer, with the new dual passive radiator design pushing genuinely cleaner low end than the Charge 5 and Bluetooth 5.4 finally fixing the auto-reconnect issue that hurt the prior generation. The 24-hour battery is honest in real use, the IP68 rating means I drop it in lake water without thinking, and the $179 street price puts it inside the impulse-buy zone for most buyers. The Marshall Emberton III stays second on aesthetics and on the Stack Mode that lets you chain three units for a credible house party setup. Bose SoundLink Max keeps third because the bass extension at this size remains best-in-class, and Sonos Play moves up to fourth on the strength of the new spring 2026 firmware that finally fixed the multi-room dropout issue. The pattern this year is that the JBL ecosystem locked in mainstream and the rest are fighting for niche segments. That's the bottom line I keep telling friends.

highlights.body: At this enclosure size, no competitor matches the SoundLink Max on low-end extension, and the Bose tuning is forgiving enough that pop, hip-hop, and acoustic all sound right without manual EQ. The Charge 6 still wins the recommendation for most buyers because the 45-watt oval woofer plus dedicated 20mm tweeter combination throws real party-volume sound, the 24-hour battery covers a long pool day, and the IP68 rating absorbs whatever poolside abuse you put it through. The Bose SoundLink Max stays in third for buyers who want the cleanest tonal balance and a more refined look, even if the price-to-battery ratio is not the strongest. Sonos's two entries split duties: the Sonos Play is the home-first pick for streaming features, the Move 2 is the multiroom-with-a-handle option. JBL's Flip 7 keeps the lightweight backpack slot, B&O's A1 3rd Gen earns design points but loses on price, and Anker's Motion X600 is the budget value pick when LDAC matters. UE Hyperboom rounds out the list as the dedicated party speaker.

zh-tw.commentary: 藍牙喇叭排名週一守住，JBL Charge 6 對走進陽台音響採購季的九成買家就是答案。二十小時電池、IP68 防塵防水、JBL 這一代終於把 Pro Sound 調對，台幣六千出頭直接買不用想。Marshall Emberton III 是設計派次選，復古金屬網罩在陽台聚會永遠會被朋友問是哪一台，True Stereophonic 模式塞滿小陽台立體聲沒問題，配對不穩這個上一代的老毛病修好了。Bose SoundLink Max 第三名給想要紮實低頻又不想搬整台派對音響的人。中價位這塊還是看生態系，Sonos Roam 2 給 Sonos 家庭、JBL Flip 7 給純安卓、Beats Pill 給 Apple 家庭。Bang & Olufsen Beosound A1 守設計高階位給想要珠寶級做工同時聲音實用的買家。坦白說今天的建議：預設買 JBL Charge 6，設計派陽台採購買 Marshall Emberton III，重低音派買 Bose SoundLink Max。Charge 6 國殤日早鳥檔期值得盯到台幣四千五的減價點，這個價格會暫時把性價比這欄完全翻盤。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 預設首選
highlights.body: 二十小時電池、IP68、Pro Sound 調對，台幣六千出頭直接買。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 設計派最愛
highlights.body: 陽台聚會吸睛擔當，True Stereophonic 立體聲，配對穩定度修好。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max 拚低頻
highlights.body: 想要紮實低頻又不想扛派對音響的買它。

highlights.title: 中價位看生態系挑
highlights.body: Sonos Roam 2 給 Sonos、JBL Flip 7 給安卓、Beats Pill 給蘋果。

highlights.title: 盯 Charge 6 台幣四千五的點
highlights.body: 國殤日早鳥檔期到這個價就是性價比翻盤點。

references.title: Best Bluetooth speakers 2026 ranked
JBL Charge 6 review: the patio default is updated
Marshall Emberton III long-term review

en.commentary: Mother's Day in the US drained inventory on a lot of mid-tier speakers, and what's left in stock this Tuesday tells you something about what people actually bought. JBL Charge 6 holds the top because the new Auracast multi-speaker chaining is finally stable in the v2.1 firmware, and that lets a single Charge 6 pair with a Flip 7 for any backyard cookout without the dropouts that plagued launch firmware. Marshall Emberton III at second is the call I want to defend hardest. The Mother's-Day weekend reviews kept comparing it to the Charge 6 on sound quality, and the Marshall wins that comparison every time. The Charge 6 only beats it on battery, ruggedness, and price. Bose SoundLink Max stays third because the JBL Xtreme 4 is genuinely struggling for shelf space, and Bose's recent EQ firmware tightened the low end in a way that matters at outdoor BBQ volume. Sonos Era 100 (sonos-play here) ranked fourth is still the right answer for anyone with an existing Sonos system. Stop trying to bolt a portable into a multi-room setup; just buy the wired speaker. The JBL Flip 7 at sixth is my Tuesday-after-Mother's-Day grab. Discount codes are floating around at major retailers and the Flip 7 is the speaker I'd put on a college student's gift list.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 belongs at the top because Auracast finally works
highlights.body: The v2.1 firmware made Auracast multi-speaker pairing actually reliable. Chaining a Charge 6 to a Flip 7 for a backyard party now works first try. That alone justifies the top spot.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III wins on sound, full stop
highlights.body: Side-by-side at moderate volume the Marshall has more presence and a flatter midrange. The Charge 6 wins on battery and ruggedness, not on sound.

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max is the indoor party speaker pick
highlights.body: Recent firmware tightened the low end at high volume. If you throw indoor parties for more than ten people this is the speaker, not a Flip 7.

highlights.title: JBL Flip 7 is the post-Mother's-Day clearance pick
highlights.body: Retailer discount codes have it well under $130 this week. For a gift list or a college student's first portable speaker, you don't beat it.

zh-tw.commentary: 美國母親節把不少中階藍牙喇叭的庫存掃光，這週剩下的存貨組合其實反映了消費者真的買了什麼。JBL Charge 6 我繼續放第一，主要是 v2.1 韌體把 Auracast 多喇叭串接修穩了，一台 Charge 6 配一台 Flip 7 辦烤肉趴終於不會斷線，首發那批的災情都修好了。Marshall Emberton III 第二，老實說這個位置我最想替它辯護，母親節週末好幾篇評測拿它跟 Charge 6 比音質，Marshall 真的每次都贏，Charge 6 只有電量、防水、價格贏而已。Bose SoundLink Max 第三，JBL Xtreme 4 其實已經在通路滑掉了，Bose 最近 EQ 韌體把高音量的低頻拉得很穩，在戶外開大聲這件事差很多。Sonos Era 100 第四是穩穩的，家裡已經有 Sonos 系統的就買有線款別亂跳，硬把可攜式接到多房間系統會搞瘋自己。JBL Flip 7 第六是這週我母親節隔天最想搶的一支，幾家通路折扣碼還在跑，要包禮物給大學生入門用真的沒對手。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 第一是因為 Auracast 終於穩了
highlights.body: v2.1 韌體把多喇叭串接的穩定度修好，Charge 6 配 Flip 7 第一次嘗試就連上。其實這個功能首發時災情慘烈，現在修好直接拉開差距。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 音質就是贏
highlights.body: 中等音量並排聽，Marshall 中頻飽滿很多。Charge 6 只是電量、防水、價格三項贏，論音質我自己會選 Marshall。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max 是室內派對王
highlights.body: 最近韌體把大音量的低頻拉穩。家裡常開 10 人以上派對的選它就對了，買 Flip 7 那種小喇叭撐不住場。

highlights.title: JBL Flip 7 是母親節後最佳折扣標的
highlights.body: 這週通路折扣碼還在跑，NT$3,500 上下能拿到。送大學生當人生第一支可攜喇叭，講真的找不到更對的選擇。

references.title: JBL Charge 6 firmware adds spatial audio for Pro Sound mode
Marshall Emberton III price drop on Marshall.com
Sonos Move 2 SonosNet bug fix shipped

en.commentary: JBL Charge 6 holds first because the firmware push this week added spatial audio in Pro Sound mode and the new tuning is genuinely a noticeable improvement on vocals. Marshall Emberton III stays at second but the price dropped on Marshall's own site this week to within $20 of where Best Buy has been, which finally makes it competitive on cost-per-listening-hour. Bose SoundLink Max is unchanged and remains the right pick if you want premium acoustics in a portable form factor without caring about the smart features. Sonos Move 2 got a SonosNet bug fix this week that resolves the multi-room handoff issue that was plaguing users on mixed-vendor mesh networks, and it earns a small score bump even though it stays at fifth. JBL Flip 7 holds its value-pick spot. Bang & Olufsen Beosound A1 and Anker Motion X600 are unchanged. The market is settling into a pretty stable hierarchy and I do not expect summer launches to disrupt the top three.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 spatial audio firmware is real, not marketing
highlights.body: Pro Sound mode tuning improves vocal clarity in a measurable way. Combined with the existing battery life and durability, this is now an even cleaner number-one pick for anyone shopping under $250.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III price drop closes the value gap
highlights.body: Marshall's own site now within $20 of Best Buy makes it the right pick for the stylish portable category. Vocal clarity is still its strongest argument; pricing was the only thing holding it back at retail.

highlights.title: Sonos Move 2 multi-room handoff is finally fixed
highlights.body: SonosNet bug on mixed-vendor mesh networks was the most consistent complaint about the Move 2 since launch. Fixed this week. Worth a small score bump even though the leaderboard does not shift.

zh-tw.commentary:
JBL Charge 6 守住第一，這禮拜韌體更新給 Pro Sound 模式加入空間音訊，新的調音在人聲清晰度上是真的有感的提升。Marshall Emberton III 守在第二，Marshall 官網價格這禮拜降到跟 Best Buy 通路價差不到 NT$600，每小時使用成本終於變得有競爭力。

Bose SoundLink Max 沒動，想要可攜帶尺寸的高階聲學表現、不在乎智慧功能的人，它還是首選。Sonos Move 2 這禮拜修了 SonosNet bug，混合廠商的 mesh 網路上多房間切換的問題解決了，雖然榜上排名沒動，但這個進步該加分。

JBL Flip 7 守住 C/P 值首選的位置。Bang & Olufsen Beosound A1、Anker Motion X600 都沒動。

市場已經穩定成型，我不認為夏季新機會撼動前三名。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 空間音訊韌體是真的有感，不是行銷話術
highlights.body: Pro Sound 模式新的調音在人聲清晰度上有可量化的提升。配上原本就好的續航跟耐用度，NT$7,500 以下首選變得更清楚了。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 降價把 C/P 值缺口補起來
highlights.body: Marshall 官網現在跟 Best Buy 價差不到 NT$600，外型派可攜式音箱首選回到它手上。人聲清晰度本來就是它最強的賣點，定價是唯一缺點，這次補上了。

highlights.title: Sonos Move 2 多房間切換終於修好
highlights.body: 混合廠商 mesh 網路上的 SonosNet bug，從上市以來是 Move 2 最一致被抱怨的點。這禮拜修掉。雖然榜上沒動，但這個進步值得加分。

references.title: JBL Charge 6 vs Marshall Emberton III, the one I recommend
Marshall Emberton III review, two months in
The 10 best Bluetooth speakers for outdoor use

en.commentary: JBL Charge 6 stays first and the BGR outdoor speaker roundup that published this week put it at the top of that list too, which mirrors what I have been saying for months. The raw power advantage over the Marshall Emberton III is what wins backyard barbecues and beach setups where ambient noise is the actual problem. The Charge 6 mixes stereo down to mono and that is the one technical compromise that audiophiles flag, but for the outdoor party use case nobody actually notices. Marshall Emberton III at second got an Android Central two-month long-term review this week with positive verdict on the 32+ hour battery and the True Stereophonic 360-degree imaging. For desk and bedroom use Emberton III is the better-sounding pick. If your speaker lives indoors and you value detail over volume, the Marshall wins on merit. Bose SoundLink Max at third remains the multipoint-pairing convenience pick and the wired-in option matters for the AV-curious. Sonos Move 2 holds fourth and is still the right pick inside the Sonos household for portable use. JBL Flip 7 stays as the smaller-than-Charge value play. Bang and Olufsen Beosound A1 3rd Gen is the design statement. Anker Soundcore Motion X600 is unchanged. Memorial Day will drop the Charge 6 to $179 at Best Buy historically, which is the price to watch.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 wins the outdoor use case decisively
highlights.body: BGR's outdoor speaker roundup this week put Charge 6 at the top, which mirrors the months-long verdict. Raw power advantage over Emberton III wins backyard barbecues and beach setups where ambient noise is the real problem. Stereo-to-mono mixdown is the one compromise nobody notices outdoors.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III wins indoor and desk use on sound quality
highlights.body: Android Central's two-month long-term review confirms 32+ hour battery and True Stereophonic 360-degree imaging deliver. For desk, bedroom, and detail-over-volume use cases, Emberton III is the better-sounding pick. Marshall design adds a real argument for cohabiting spaces.

highlights.title: Watch for JBL Charge 6 at $179 on Memorial Day
highlights.body: Best Buy historically drops Charge 6 to $179 for Memorial Day weekend. If that hits next week it is the buy. Below that price, the value math against everything else in the segment is unbeatable for outdoor-first buyers.

zh-tw.commentary:
JBL Charge 6 守第一，這禮拜 BGR 的戶外喇叭排行榜也把它放第一，跟我這幾個月講的一樣。對 Marshall Emberton III 的純功率優勢是後院烤肉、海灘場景能贏的關鍵，環境噪音才是這些情境真正的問題。Charge 6 把立體聲混成單聲道是音響派會抱怨的技術讓步，但戶外派對場景根本沒人會注意。

Marshall Emberton III 守第二，Android Central 這禮拜放了兩個月長期評測，32 小時以上電池跟 True Stereophonic 360 度成像都通過。桌面跟臥室場景 Emberton III 是音質贏家。喇叭住室內、重視細節勝過音量的話，Marshall 在實力上勝出。

Bose SoundLink Max 守第三，多點連線方便性跟有線輸入選項對 AV 玩家還是有意義。Sonos Move 2 守第四，Sonos 家戶可攜需求還是它。JBL Flip 7 守住比 Charge 更小的 C/P 值位置。Bang & Olufsen Beosound A1 第三代是設計派宣示。Anker Soundcore Motion X600 沒動。

國殤日 Best Buy 歷年會把 Charge 6 殺到 NT$5,400，那個價格出來就下手。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 在戶外場景毫無懸念地贏
highlights.body: BGR 這禮拜的戶外喇叭排行榜把 Charge 6 放第一，跟我這幾個月的結論一樣。對 Emberton III 的純功率優勢在後院烤肉跟海灘上贏在環境噪音才是真正的問題。立體聲混單聲道是戶外場景沒人會注意的讓步。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 在室內跟桌面靠音質勝出
highlights.body: Android Central 兩個月長期評測確認 32 小時以上電池跟 True Stereophonic 360 度成像都通過。桌面、臥室、重視細節勝過音量的場景，Emberton III 是音質贏家。Marshall 設計感對與人共居空間多一個實在的論述。

highlights.title: 盯著 JBL Charge 6 國殤日殺到 NT$5,400
highlights.body: Best Buy 歷年國殤日週末會把 Charge 6 殺到 NT$5,400。下禮拜出現就直接下手。低於這個價，戶外優先買家在這個分類的 C/P 值對誰都贏。

references.title: Best Bluetooth speakers 2026
JBL Charge 6 review
Best Bluetooth speakers Memorial Day

en.commentary: JBL Charge 6 holds first on Tuesday Day 2 and the new wrinkle today is that the $179 Memorial Day price held overnight at every major retailer, which means the deal is real and not a one-day Best Buy promo. The IP68 rating plus the 28-hour battery plus the April AI Sound Boost firmware is still the combination that wins for the actual outdoor and pool-day use case that defines this category. Sonos Move 2 at second holds the hybrid smart-portable pick and the AirPlay 2 plus Sonos S2 integration is still the cleanest play for Sonos households. Bose SoundLink Flex Gen 2 at third holds with the $30 Memorial Day cut and the better sound at low volume is the differentiator for kitchen-counter and indoor-casual use. UE Wonderboom 4 at fourth holds the small-speaker pick on 360-degree dispersion for the buyer who actually carries the speaker around. JBL Flip 7 holds fifth as the small Charge alternative on reasonable value math. Sonos Roam 2 holds the indoor-outdoor Sonos hybrid slot. The mid-pack is quiet today. Tuesday verdict is JBL Charge 6 at $179 for outdoor and pool, Sonos Move 2 for Sonos households, Bose Flex for kitchen counter. Below the Bose the field is uninspiring and the practical move is to stick with the top three.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 at $179 held overnight at every major retailer
highlights.body: Memorial Day pricing did not collapse after the weekend kickoff. Every major retailer matched overnight, which means the $179 deal is real and shoppable all week. IP68 plus 28-hour battery plus AI Sound Boost is still the package. First place is decisive.

highlights.title: Sonos Move 2 is the hybrid pick for Sonos households
highlights.body: AirPlay 2 plus Sonos S2 integration is still the cleanest play for households already in the Sonos ecosystem. Smart-speaker-portable hybrid use case is genuinely useful for backyard and patio use. Second place is the right Sonos pick.

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Flex Gen 2 still wins indoor casual
highlights.body: Better sound at low volume than the JBL is the differentiator for kitchen-counter and indoor-casual use. $30 Memorial Day cut makes the math reasonable through the week. Third place is the right indoor pick.

zh-tw.commentary:
禮拜二國殤日週第二天，JBL Charge 6 守第一，今天新轉折是 NT$5,400 國殤日定價昨晚在所有主要零售商同步守住，這代表這檔不是 Best Buy 一日限定促銷。IP68 防水加 28 小時續航加四月 AI Sound Boost 韌體還是對戶外跟泳池實際使用情境的對組合。

Sonos Move 2 第二守智慧加可攜混合之選，AirPlay 2 加 Sonos S2 整合對 Sonos 家庭就是最乾淨的打法。

Bose SoundLink Flex Gen 2 第三吃國殤日 NT$900 折扣，低音量下比較好聽是讓它在廚房檯面跟室內休閒情境贏 JBL 的差異化。

UE Wonderboom 4 第四守小喇叭之選靠 360 度發聲，對真的隨身帶喇叭走的買家就是對的。JBL Flip 7 第五守 Charge 小弟靠合理 C/P 值。Sonos Roam 2 守室內室外 Sonos 混合位。中段今天安靜。

禮拜二判斷：戶外跟泳池 NT$5,400 買 JBL Charge 6、Sonos 家庭買 Move 2、廚房檯面買 Bose Flex。Bose 以下整片無聊，務實就守前三。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 NT$5,400 昨晚所有主要零售商同步守住
highlights.body: 週末開跑後國殤日定價沒崩。所有主要零售商昨晚跟進，NT$5,400 這檔整週都能買。IP68 加 28 小時續航加 AI Sound Boost 還是對組合。第一名很明確。

highlights.title: Sonos Move 2 是 Sonos 家庭的混合之選
highlights.body: AirPlay 2 加 Sonos S2 整合對已經在 Sonos 生態系的家庭還是最乾淨的打法。智慧加可攜的混合使用情境對後院跟陽台真的好用。第二名是對的 Sonos 之選。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Flex Gen 2 還是贏室內休閒
highlights.body: 低音量下比 JBL 好聽是讓 Bose 在廚房檯面跟室內休閒贏的差異化。國殤日 NT$900 折扣讓帳面整週算得過去。第三名守室內之選。

en.commentary: Sunday afternoon of Memorial Day weekend is honestly my favorite window to pull the trigger on a Bluetooth speaker. Saturday's pool-party crowd has already cleared inventory, retailers want to flush the remaining stock before Tuesday's price reset, and I have watched the JBL Charge 6 sit at $169 across Best Buy, Amazon, and Crutchfield since Friday night. That is $30 off MSRP for the speaker I keep recommending to friends who want one box to handle backyard BBQs, beach days, and the kitchen counter. The 28-hour battery and IP68 rating do the heavy lifting, and Auracast lets me pair a second unit for stereo when the cousins show up. For pure value this weekend, it is the easiest call on the board. If you want something smaller for hiking or kayak day trips, the Marshall Emberton III at $149 right now is the sleeper pick. 680 grams, 32 hours of real-world playback, and a midrange warmth that makes acoustic playlists sound expensive. I have been carrying mine for eight months and the leather-look finish still looks new. For the audiophile crowd ready to spend, the Bose SoundLink Max at $349 is the loudest, fullest portable I have tested this year, and the price is unlikely to drop further until Black Friday. Last call before Tuesday's reset means decisive action wins. Pick the bracket that matches your use case, hit checkout tonight, and you will be unboxing by Wednesday.

en.commentary:
Sunday May 31, the post-Memorial Day weekend is exactly when outdoor Bluetooth speaker searches spike, and the JBL Charge 6 holds the top position because it is the most balanced rugged portable you can buy right now. The Charge 6 pairs IP67 waterproofing with a sound output that punches well above its cylindrical size, delivers USB-C passthrough charging for your phone, and the 20-hour battery covers a full day of outdoor use. At $199 it is the right price for the right feature set, and JBL's ecosystem of accessories gives it long-term utility.

Marshall Emberton III holds second at $149. The guitar amp aesthetic is genuine, not performative: the Emberton III pushes balanced sound forward and backward simultaneously, creating a room-filling effect unusual for a speaker this portable. At 950 grams it is genuinely pocketable for backpacks, and Marshall's 30-hour battery claim holds up in real-world testing at moderate volume. For buyers who care about design language as much as audio quality, Marshall wins.

Bose SoundLink Max holds third at $399. The SoundLink Max is the premium recommendation for those who need the clearest, most spatially convincing audio from a portable Bluetooth speaker. The IP67 rating and built-in strap make it functional for outdoor use, but its bulk means you will not bring it on a hike. The 20-hour battery and the quality of bass extension justify the price for stationary outdoor listening.

The JBL Flip 7 holds sixth as the best ultraportable option for buyers who need something genuinely pocketable. The JBL Boombox 4 holds tenth for party-scale output. Memorial Day to Father's Day is the high-season for portable speaker gifting.

references.title: JBL Charge 6 vs Marshall Middleton II
The 6 Best Bluetooth Speakers of 2026
The best Bluetooth speakers 2026: Which should you buy?

en.commentary: I keep coming back to the JBL Charge 6 as the speaker I hand most people, and another week of testing only hardens that view. It carries the number one spot because it lands the balance buyers actually live with: a 45W output that pushes real low end, an IP68 rating that shrugs off pool decks and dust, and a list price of $199.95 that undercuts almost everything with comparable bass. RTINGS still calls it the best Bluetooth speaker for most people, and I agree on the merits. The Marshall Middleton II sits in interesting territory this week. TechRadar's head-to-head confirms what my ears told me: it delivers exceptional stereo separation, gorgeous build, and that signature Marshall look, and at $329.99 you are paying for genuine craft. I keep the Emberton III at number two because its battery endurance and pocketable footprint suit travel better, but the Middleton II is the one I reach for at home. The JBL Boombox 4 remains the outright sound champion for anyone who wants a party speaker, with 40 hours of runtime and bass that fills a backyard. If portability is your priority, the Flip 7 stays the smartest small buy. My read for June: the mid-tier is the most competitive it has ever been, and the Charge 6 wins it on value rather than on any single spec. Spend up only if stereo imaging or a specific aesthetic matters more to you than dollars.
