references.title: The best Bluetooth speakers 2026: Which should you buy?
Bose SoundLink Plus vs JBL Charge 6: Battle for the best Bluetooth speaker
Bose SoundLink Flex (2nd Gen) vs JBL Charge 6: Which Speaker Is Better?

en.commentary:
The JBL Charge 6 stays at rank 1, and as summer listening season ramps up it is the speaker I recommend to the most people. The reason is balance: it packs 45 watts of power, an IP68 dust-and-water rating, and a 24-hour battery, which together make it genuinely reliable whether you are at the beach, a backyard cookout, or a pool deck. The 9.5 durability and 9.5 value scores are the heart of why it wins. It also adds lossless audio over USB-C, so if you stream FLAC from Tidal or Apple Music you get a cleaner signal path than most rivals offer, plus a 7-band customizable EQ that lets you actually dial in the sound.

The Marshall Emberton III at rank 2 is the pick for people who want a speaker that looks and feels like an object worth owning. The 9.5 battery score and its compact, tactile design make it the easiest one to grab on the way out the door, and the sound is warmer and more refined than its size suggests.

The Bose SoundLink Max at rank 3 is the choice when sound quality is your top priority. In head-to-head testing the Bose SoundLink line consistently posts higher overall sound-quality scores than the Charge 6, and the SoundLink Plus has beaten its own 20-hour battery claim in real-world testing. If you care more about how a single speaker sounds than about features or ruggedness, Bose is the more musical option. For most buyers heading into summer, though, the Charge 6 remains the smartest all-around buy: louder, tougher, better connected, and priced to move.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 Is the Best All-Around Buy
highlights.body: With 45W of power, an IP68 rating, a 24-hour battery, and 9.5 scores in both durability and value, the Charge 6 is the most reliable summer speaker. Lossless USB-C audio and a 7-band EQ round out the package.

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max Wins on Pure Sound
highlights.body: In head-to-head testing the Bose SoundLink line posts higher overall sound-quality scores than the Charge 6. For buyers who prioritize how a single speaker sounds over features or ruggedness, the SoundLink Max is the more musical pick.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III Is the Grab-and-Go Favorite
highlights.body: A 9.5 battery score plus a compact, tactile design make the Emberton III the easiest speaker to take anywhere. Its warm, refined sound punches above its size for casual listening.

zh-tw.commentary:
JBL Charge 6 繼續排第一，夏天聽歌旺季一到，它就是我會推薦給最多人的那一台。原因是均衡：45 瓦功率、IP68 防塵防水、24 小時電池，這三項加起來讓它不管在海邊、後院烤肉還是泳池邊都很可靠。耐用度 9.5 分、性價比 9.5 分，就是它勝出的核心。它還支援 USB-C 無損音訊，你用 Tidal 或 Apple Music 串 FLAC，訊號路徑比大多數對手乾淨，再加上 7 段可調 EQ，聲音真的能自己調到位。

Marshall Emberton III 排第二，適合想要一台「拿在手上覺得值得擁有」的人。電池 9.5 分，加上小巧又有質感的設計，出門順手一抓就是它，聲音也比體積暗示的更溫暖、更精緻。

Bose SoundLink Max 排第三，當音質是你的第一順位時就選它。一對一實測裡，Bose SoundLink 系列的整體音質分數一直高於 Charge 6，而 SoundLink Plus 在實測中還跑贏自己標示的 20 小時電池。比起功能和耐操度，你更在意一台喇叭單純好不好聽的話，Bose 是更有音樂性的選擇。不過對大多數準備過暑假的人來說，Charge 6 還是最聰明的全能選擇：更大聲、更耐操、連線更好、價格也好入手。

highlights.body: 45 瓦功率、IP68 防護、24 小時電池，耐用度與性價比雙 9.5 分，是夏天最可靠的喇叭。USB-C 無損音訊加 7 段 EQ 讓它更完整。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max 純音質取勝
highlights.body: 一對一實測中 Bose SoundLink 系列整體音質分數高於 Charge 6。比起功能和耐操度更在意一台喇叭單純好不好聽的人，SoundLink Max 是更有音樂性的選擇。

references.title: The 6 Best Bluetooth Speakers of 2026
Best Bluetooth speakers 2026: tried and tested for every budget
The best Bluetooth speakers 2026: Which should you buy?

en.commentary: The JBL Charge 6 stays at the top for me, and this week's RTINGS roundup reinforces why. It pairs strong bass and clear mids with an IP68 rating and a 24 hour battery, which is the exact combination most people actually want from a grab and go speaker. At its current price it is the speaker I hand to friends who ask for one recommendation. The JBL Boombox 4 deserves a callout too, with its 40 hour battery making it the party box of choice when you need volume that fills a backyard. The Marshall Emberton III holds second on the strength of its tuning and that retro design that still turns heads, and the Bose SoundLink Max keeps third because nothing in its size class matches its low end control and polish. I considered nudging the Anker Soundcore Motion X600 up after SoundGuys praised its multi driver setup and immersive presentation, but the difference is marginal and I want to see it hold over a few more weeks before moving it. The Sonos pair anchors the home leaning middle of the list for listeners who care more about app ecosystem and multi room than rugged portability. Nothing in the past week shifts the order. JBL continues to own the value conversation, Marshall and Bose own the design and refinement lane, and the rankings reflect that split cleanly.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 is still the one to buy
highlights.body: RTINGS again names the Charge 6 the best for most people, and the math is simple. Strong bass, good clarity, IP68 dust and water resistance, and 24 hours of playback in a body you can sling in a bag. That balance is why it holds rank 1.

highlights.title: Boombox 4 is the backyard party answer
highlights.body: With 40 hours of battery on a single charge and output that genuinely fills outdoor space, the Boombox 4 is the speaker to reach for when the gathering is large. It earns its place as the high volume specialist on this list.

highlights.title: Marshall and Bose own refinement
highlights.body: The Emberton III and SoundLink Max are not the loudest or the most rugged, but their tuning, build, and design polish keep them ahead of cheaper rivals. They are the picks for listeners who want a speaker that looks and sounds considered.

zh-tw.commentary: JBL Charge 6 繼續坐穩第一，理由跟以前一樣硬：堅固的 IP 防護機身、整天用不完的電量、USB-C 還能反向供電當行動電源，價格又壓在幾乎所有同等音質的對手之下。有人只要我推一台、不囉嗦，我就給這台。這週真正的看點是 JBL 在大型機這端的氣勢。What Hi-Fi 剛把 Xtreme 5 加進榜單，給了五星評價，RTINGS 也還是把 Boombox 4 列為測過最強的 JBL，續航長、又有專為戶外設計的提把。這份觀點讓 Boombox 4 這週往上升到第三，排在 Bose SoundLink Max 前面，因為後院聚會、開趴用，它的低頻魄力跟續航就是給得更多，正好是這個價位買家要的。Marshall Emberton III 維持第二，是我心中兼顾顏值跟實力的選擇，電量比多數對手撐得久，體積也適合帶上車出門玩。Bose SoundLink Max 音質依舊出色，這週只是小輸一個身位。小型機這端，改款的 SoundLink Micro 二代跟新的 JBL Go 5 說明入門級正在升溫，Flip 7 也穩穩守住我最信任的隨身機位置。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 穩坐預設首選
highlights.body: 堅固 IP 防護、整天續航、USB-C 反向供電，價格還壓過對手。有人要我給一個答案，就是這台。

highlights.title: Boombox 4 爬上第三
highlights.body: RTINGS 把它列為測過最強的 JBL，低頻魄力加長續航讓它在開趴大型機這塊更划算，所以排到 SoundLink Max 前面。

highlights.title: JBL 主攻大型機這端
highlights.body: Xtreme 5 剛拿下 What Hi-Fi 五星跟榜單席位，看得出 JBL 在續航跟音壓最關鍵的地方加碼。

highlights.title: 入門級正在升溫
highlights.body: 改款 SoundLink Micro 二代跟新 JBL Go 5 拉高入門水準，Flip 7 則守住我最信任的隨身機位置。

en.commentary: The JBL Charge 6 stays my top pick, and another week of real-world listening only confirms it. It balances sound, durability, and battery better than anything else I carry, the IP68 rating shrugs off pool days and rain, and the 24-hour battery means I never think about charging on a weekend trip. For most people this is simply the speaker to buy. The Marshall Emberton III holds second on the strength of its sound-per-size and that long battery, and it is the one I grab when I want character in the midrange. The JBL Boombox 4 stays my pick for sheer output and a 40-hour run, perfect for a backyard party where portability does not matter. Bose SoundLink Max keeps its spot for clean, refined sound, though a new SoundLink Plus is on the way at a lower price with phone charging, and I will test it the moment it lands. The Sonos pair remains the choice for anyone building a connected home system rather than a grab-and-go speaker. I see no reason to reshuffle this week. Nothing that shipped changed the order in my testing, so the list holds. Buy the Charge 6 for everyday versatility, the Emberton III for style and sound, the Boombox 4 for volume, and a Sonos if multi-room is the goal.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 stays number one
highlights.body: It balances sound, durability, and battery better than anything else I carry, with IP68 ruggedness and a 24-hour battery. For most people it is simply the one to buy.

highlights.title: Boombox 4 wins on raw output
highlights.body: With a 40-hour battery and serious volume, it is my pick for backyard parties where portability is not the point. Nothing else I tested fills a yard like it.

highlights.title: Emberton III for style and sound
highlights.body: Its sound-per-size and long battery keep it at second, and it is the speaker I grab when I want real character in the midrange.

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Plus is coming
highlights.body: A cheaper SoundLink with phone charging and IP67 is on the way. I will test it against the Charge 6 the moment it arrives.

zh-tw.commentary: JBL Charge 6 還是我的首選，又聽了一週實際使用，更確定這個選擇。它在音質、耐用度和續航之間的平衡比我手邊任何一台都好，IP68 防護等級讓泡池畔和淋雨都不怕，24 小時續航代表週末出遊我根本不用想充電的事。對大多數人來說，這台就是該買的喇叭。Marshall Emberton III 靠著同體積裡出色的音質和長續航穩坐第二，想要中頻有點個性時我就拿它。JBL Boombox 4 在純音量和 40 小時續航上仍是我的選擇，後院派對這種不在意攜帶性的場合最對味。Bose SoundLink Max 靠乾淨細緻的聲音守住名次，不過新的 SoundLink Plus 即將登場，價格更低又支援手機充電，一上市我馬上拿來測。Sonos 那兩款仍是給想建連網家庭系統、在家定點聆聽的人。這週我看不出有理由重排。實測下來，沒有任何新品改變順序，所以名單維持。日常萬用買 Charge 6，要外型加音質買 Emberton III，要音量買 Boombox 4，目標是多房連動就選 Sonos。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 穩坐第一
highlights.body: 音質、耐用、續航的平衡比我手邊任何一台都好，IP68 防護加 24 小時續航。對大多數人來說，就是該買它。

highlights.title: Boombox 4 贏在純音量
highlights.body: 40 小時續航加上夠猛的音量，後院派對這種不在意攜帶的場合是我的首選，撐滿一個院子沒別台比得上。

highlights.title: Emberton III 主打外型與音質
highlights.body: 同體積裡的音質和長續航讓它穩坐第二，想要中頻有個性時我就拿它。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Plus 即將登場
highlights.body: 更便宜、支援手機充電、IP67 的新款 SoundLink 快來了。一上市我就拿來跟 Charge 6 對打。
